name: Mark McCloskey
subject: Join Me This Sunday for RINO Roast!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
we have a bit of time to throw a BBQ where we’ll be gathered (WITHOUT MASKS) to talk about the direction of the country, winning back the SENATE

|
Fellow American,

Mark McCloskey here writing to let you know about a little shindig my wife Patty and I are hosting this coming weekend to celebrate the majority of the charges against us being dropped by the state attorney general.

Now that we’ve largely been vindicated for the actions which we took to stand up to the violent Black Lives Matter mob that marched through our neighborhood last summer in search of making trouble, we have a bit of time to throw a BBQ where we’ll be gathered (WITHOUT MASKS) to talk about the direction of the country, winning back the SENATE from the socialist Democrats, and how we can keep the Republican Party clear of RINO’S now and in the future.

If you’re in or around St. Louis, we’d LOVE for you to drop by so we can meet you. There will be food, live music and adult beverages provided, along with special guest Rep. Madison Cawthorn!

name: Team Fitzgerald
subject: Are Biden's Blunders Overseas Making America Weaker?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
lWhen Joe Biden sat down with Vladmir Putin last week, [it could have been a moment for American strength](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mukiko-ahkdjtlkr-r/).Instead, the headlines were about anything _other_ than strength -- Joe Biden's list of pre-selected reporters, then yelling at a reporter because he didn't like the question, then apologizing to the press. We need to make America STRONG again, AND IT CAN'T WAIT UNTIL 2024. [Will you help IMMEDIATELY?](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mukiko-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [[ JOIN CONGRESSMAN FITZGERALD ] - Make America Strong Again](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mukiko-ahkdjtlkr-j/) This meeting with Putin isn't the only place America is showing its weakness under total Democrat control. **Joe Biden refusing to take on China.****Radical Democrats refusing to back Israel.****Kamala Harris refusing to travel to the border she's supposed to be in charge of.** THAT'S the kind of foreign policy that's making America **WEAK**. **This can't wait until 2024. This list of failure - _with much more to come_ - is exactly why we need to TAKE BACK CONGRESS IMMEDIATELY, and salvage the next two years before we can take back the presidency!**[Please, click here immediately to support Congressman Fitzgerald and FIGHT BACK against the Democrats' failures, and take back the majority next year!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mukiko-ahkdjtlkr-t/)-Team Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mukiko-ahkdjtlkr-i/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mukiko-ahkdjtlkr-k/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: You know me... I'm not one to mince words.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
You don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.
Hey Peter, it's Governor Ron DeSantis. You know me -- I'm not one to mince words.
**Neither is President Trump.**
That's why I proudly supported him when he just made this bold statement: _" The survival of America depends upon our ability to elect Republicans at every level."_
The Liberal Media, the Radical Socialists in Congress, and Joe Biden's cronies are plowing ahead to FUNDAMENTALLY change everything that makes America great.
[**I 'm asking for you to help Republicans right now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57780403:6KBAvKlNz:m:1:3253819041:95366C9959290D0C1B79399ED5A4AA3F:r)
Our country is at a crossroad.
We either let the Democrats turn America into a Socialist country and tear President Trump's legacy apart...
**OR we come together and prove that our America first movement is worth fighting for!**
[**If every Patriot chips in a few bucks, we will have the resources to elect Republicans up and down the ballot!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57780404:6KBAvKlNz:m:1:3253819041:95366C9959290D0C1B79399ED5A4AA3F:r)
_This won't be easy -- we need your help._
...And you don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.
**That 's why I'm coming directly to you, Peter. Are you in?**
For America,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57780404:6KBAvKlNz:m:1:3253819041:95366C9959290D0C1B79399ED5A4AA3F:r)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Twitter and we need your help, Peter
body:
Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. For almost an entire year, big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook, and Google have silenced and censored millions of conservative Americans for speaking freely or questioning the government-approved "opinions" on the coronavirus or the 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough, we've now uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with these Big Tech corporations to de-platform and silence conservatives for raising legitimate concerns over the integrity of the 2020 election. ** ** **In other words, we 've caught big government unconstitutionally colluding with big tech to silence their political opponents...** And unless folks like you and me take immediate action to stop this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. [**That is why I am urgently asking you and every other American patriot reading this letter to contribute $35 or more to help us sue Twitter and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57781269:JGjXcKlPN:m:1:3253819041:92D090E08A4144442281ACBC9B08FD07:r) Let me explain... In 2018, the state government of California created the Office of Elections Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on election laws and procedures. And as any sensible person could predict, this office quickly devolved into a political weapon for censorship by the far-left Secretary of State's Office. The reason I mention this is because this past February, conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley logged onto Twitter when he found that he had been banned from Twitter for violating the governments "rules about election integrity". [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57781269:JGjXcKlPN:m:1:3253819041:92D090E08A4144442281ACBC9B08FD07:r) You see, from November 2020 to February 2021, Rogan tweeted a series of messages expressing his concerns over the dubious presidential election procedures and skepticism over the results. And every time he made a statement that was deemed a "violation", it was promptly removed from Twitter. But that is not the worst of it... Recently, documents were found showing that leftist operatives within the Election Cybersecurity office flagged Rogan's tweets as "misinformation" and coded it as an "orange" level threat indicating problematic speech. _**Then it happened ...**_ After Rogan dared to question the legitimacy of the number of votes Joe Biden received during the election, Twitter permanently suspended Rogan altogether. Hopefully I don't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs and opinions is a gross violation of our freedom of speech. But Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and followed by more than four hundred thousand people. So, it was clear that the only reason his account was suspended was because left was worried that Rogan's tweets could damage Joe Biden's image. In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden. The liberal elites responsible for de-platforming Rogan were also worries that his tweets would destroy the image of then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla - _who at the time was being considered to fill Kamala Harris ' vacated Senate seat. _ It's doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between big government and big tech to silence political opponents is corrupt and wildly unconstitutional. **And that 's why me and my team of superb constitutional lawyers are suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault on the First Amendment. ** ** ** [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57781269:JGjXcKlPN:m:1:3253819041:92D090E08A4144442281ACBC9B08FD07:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I founded the Center for American Liberty to defend our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties from the corporations, politicians, socialist revolutionaries, and inept or bias government officials who try to infringe them. But I'll be honest with you, I never thought the assault on our individual rights would become this bad. Not only are we suing Twitter - a multi-billion-dollar corporation - for their gross infringement on Rogan's First Amendment right to free speech... We are simultaneously taking on the former-Secretary of State of California Alex Padilla for blatantly colluding with Twitter to silence conservative Americans for sharing their political opinions. **And even though we intend to win, this will be the hardest legal battle we 've ever fought.** You see, as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the help of like-minded conservative patriots like yourself. _ _ _And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000._ _ _ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a one-time contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57781269:JGjXcKlPN:m:1:3253819041:92D090E08A4144442281ACBC9B08FD07:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, corporations, and government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still the master of our own lives? [**I hope you join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing any amount to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57781269:JGjXcKlPN:m:1:3253819041:92D090E08A4144442281ACBC9B08FD07:r) Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures lambasted President Trump for the completely bogus allegations that he colluded with a foreign power to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech billionaires to influence the 2020 election, those same leftists are completely silent. I don't know about you, but I am fed up with the left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and flagrant unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57781269:JGjXcKlPN:m:1:3253819041:92D090E08A4144442281ACBC9B08FD07:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57781269:JGjXcKlPN:m:1:3253819041:92D090E08A4144442281ACBC9B08FD07:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57781269:JGjXcKlPN:m:1:3253819041:92D090E08A4144442281ACBC9B08FD07:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57781269:JGjXcKlPN:m:1:3253819041:92D090E08A4144442281ACBC9B08FD07:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57781270:JGjXcKlPN:m:1:3253819041:92D090E08A4144442281ACBC9B08FD07:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

body:
All across the country, Republicans have been hard at work chipping away at the right to vote. We have to take action to stop them from undermining the fundamentals of our democracy.
#
Peter,
All across the country, Republicans have been hard at work chipping away at the right to vote. We have to take action to stop them from undermining the fundamentals of our democracy.
**[This week, the Senate will vote on the For the People Act to protect voting rights. Sign the petition now to show your support to get this done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31207845/291931638/-163397765?ms=pm_em_210622_1&refcode=pm_em_210622_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODI3NTc5Zi02OGQzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=na3zGS1QGgfbvU7PCa7PZn7WsenTtOfdElg9et48520=&emci=be883485-64d3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c827579f-68d3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=13116610)**
A strong democracy depends on fair and free elections where every eligible voter has unobstructed access to the polls. They should not be forced to jump through hoops and overcome obstacles to make their voices heard. _That’s just not how a democracy works._
This legislation isn’t about one party or the other -- it’s about the sacred right to vote in this country. It is our responsibility to ensure that every eligible American can cast their ballot.
**[Are you with me, Peter? Add your name now to support the For the People Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31207852/291931689/-163397765?ms=pm_em_210622_1&refcode=pm_em_210622_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODI3NTc5Zi02OGQzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=na3zGS1QGgfbvU7PCa7PZn7WsenTtOfdElg9et48520=&emci=be883485-64d3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c827579f-68d3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=13116610)**
When we restrict people's votes, we restrict their voices. A democracy cannot succeed if people are not allowed to speak. And I'm determined to fight for our democracy every step of the way.
Thank you,
Patty

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Urge the Senate to pass the For the People Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
This is urgent.
#

Today, the Senate will vote on the _For the People Act_ , legislation to undo voter suppression and save American democracy.
**[Please, join me in urging the Senate to pass this legislation today. The _For the People Act_ will go a long way in fortifying the foundations of our democracy, so this is important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31211659/291938123/-60551587?refcode2=bd5eb3af-6ad3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210622-1-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDVlYjNhZi02YWQzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qeylwIorAzw6T0yuVPqSkw9-q8GCizFE_iShOOwtQdA=&emci=e2a10527-60d3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=bd5eb3af-6ad3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)**
I was proud to support the _For the People Act_ when it passed in the House of Representatives earlier this year. If it gets through the Senate, this legislation will:
* Undo racist voter suppression laws in states like Georgia and Florida
* Establish mail-in and early voting in all 50 states
* Enact automatic voter registration
* Create independent redistricting committees to end partisan gerrymandering
* Establish a small-dollar matching program for campaign donations

We need the _For the People Act_ more than ever now, because Republicans have demonstrated over and over again that they won’t stop their attacks on our democracy.
In Arizona, the state legislature made it more difficult for individuals living in rural areas to cast mail in-ballots, a law that disproportionately hurt people of color.
In Florida, voters approved a referendum that would allow formerly incarcerated people to vote, only for the Republican-dominated state legislature to implement a glorified poll tax to circumvent the will of the voters. The list goes on.
The only solution is robust federal legislation that will strengthen voting rights - and that’s what the _For the People Act_ will do. So I’m asking:
**[Please, join me in urging the Senate to pass this legislation today. The _For the People Act_ will go a long way in fortifying the foundations of our democracy, so this is important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31211661/291938125/-60551587?refcode2=bd5eb3af-6ad3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210622-1-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDVlYjNhZi02YWQzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qeylwIorAzw6T0yuVPqSkw9-q8GCizFE_iShOOwtQdA=&emci=e2a10527-60d3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=bd5eb3af-6ad3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)**
It’s outrageous that a major political party in the United States wants to prevent Americans from exercising their constitutional right to vote. But I’ll never stop fighting to save our democracy, and I’m proud to have you by my side in this fight.
Onward,
Mondaire

clean_body: This is urgent. Today, the Senate will vote on the For the People Act , legislation to undo voter suppression and save American democracy. I was proud to support the For the People Act when it passed in the House of Representatives earlier this year. If it gets through the Senate, this legislation will: Undo racist voter suppression laws in states like Georgia and Florida Establish mail-in and early voting in all 50 states Enact automatic voter registration Create independent redistricting committees to end partisan gerrymandering Establish a small-dollar matching program for campaign donations We need the For the People Act more than ever now, because Republicans have demonstrated over and over again that they won’t stop their attacks on our democracy. In Arizona, the state legislature made it more difficult for individuals living in rural areas to cast mail in-ballots, a law that disproportionately hurt people of color. In Florida, voters approved a referendum that would allow formerly incarcerated people to vote, only for the Republican-dominated state legislature to implement a glorified poll tax to circumvent the will of the voters. The list goes on. The only solution is robust federal legislation that will strengthen voting rights - and that’s what the For the People Act will do. So I’m asking: It’s outrageous that a major political party in the United States wants to prevent Americans from exercising their constitutional right to vote. But I’ll never stop fighting to save our democracy, and I’m proud to have you by my side in this fight. Onward, Mondaire | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Capitol St. SW Suite 407 Washington, DC 20003 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: The Senate needs to hear from you today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

In 1965, my friend John Lewis marched along the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama to advocate for the right to vote. Now, 56 years later, this march isn't over. **In fact, we need to be marching for the right to vote more than ever.**

In 2021 alone, more than 385 new laws have been proposed in 48 states to limit mail-in voting, early in-person and Election Day voting. Republican leaders in some states are spreading unfounded conspiracy theories about mail-in voting, while others pass modern-day poll taxes. The right to vote is under attack.

While some of my Republican colleagues may claim these measures are a good idea, none of them pass my "grandma's test."

Let me explain, Peter: my grandma became a citizen when she was 87 years old and was an active voter until she passed away 22 years later. How would the voting laws we're seeing states pass impact my grandma?

Voter ID laws would have forced my grandma to pay for an ID card -- in our state that costs $54. In other words, my grandma would have to pay a "poll tax" to vote. Proposals that would limit polling places and end early voting would force my grandma to wait in line for hours. At the age of 90+, this wouldn't be possible.

These new laws wouldn't work for my grandma, and they especially won't work for communities of color across our country. According to the Brennan Center, they will disproportionately harm Black voters.

**Congress must act before any more of these voter suppression laws are enacted.**

That's just what HR 1 -- the For The People Act -- would do. I was proud to vote in favor of this bill when it passed the House earlier this year, and now we need the Senate to pass this legislation when they hold a vote later TODAY.

**[We need to make our voices heard now more than ever. If you support protecting the right to vote, add your name to demand the Senate pass HR 1. The Senate needs to hear from you today, Peter.](https://act.myngp.com/el/mfCmKwVhgXfX3m-ecwXS03ESHpiUAf7ipAubP-jfqn4=/0WfHQBVxhMy0rDWP_TJnH0uf2e_Eai7vWVpIbJPutgc=?gpsid=50_115_19476&ms=em21_210622_HR1_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&refcode=em21_210622_HR1_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210622_HR1_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

And after we've made HR 1 the law of the land, we need to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. This would restore the integrity of the original Voting Rights Act -- which John Lewis fought so hard to secure.

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/mfCmKwVhgXfX3m-ecwXS03ESHpiUAf7ipAubP-jfqn4=/2vrJdmzDtZwW3J08-ElODd_UzZbEZw0qZBRxkb5_9I8=?gpsid=50_115_19477&refcode=em21_210622_HR1_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210622_HR1_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

name: Andrew Whitley
subject: Welcome to the team, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31213468/291946341/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWYxMDViYS02ZmQzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bSZgrmLXqXRU8gc_4FBzGHjAvqU_JnKAAY_T7_upcJo=&emci=e16c7875-44de-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=d1f105ba-6fd3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15759664)

| | I wanted to be the first person to reach out and welcome you to the team, Derek. The Democratic Party of Virginia is made up of some of the most committed and most fired-up people I’ve ever worked with, and we’re pumped to have you!

We had some great successes over the past few years:
* 2017: We **flipped 15 House seats** in the General Assembly -- Virginia’s largest electoral shift since 1899.
* 2018: We re-elected Senator Tim Kaine and **flipped 3 congressional districts** , sending three first-time Congresswomen -- Elaine Luria, Jennifer Wexton, and Abigail Spanberger -- to Washington.
* 2019: We ran the most aggressive coordinated campaign in the history of our Commonwealth -- flipping both chambers of the General Assembly and giving Democrats trifecta control of state government for the first time in over 25 years.
* 2020: **We sent Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to the White House** in a resounding repudiation of Donald Trump. And we re-elected our entire Congressional delegation of Democrats and Senator Mark Warner -- all in the midst of a raging pandemic.

But the work doesn’t stop here. Virginia has elections _every year_ \-- and in 2021 the top positions of governor, lieutenant governor, and attorney general are all up for grabs. Unfortunately, Virginia also has a long history of electing governors from the party that just lost the White House. And you can bet the Republicans are going to fight their hardest to keep that trend alive.

I won’t lie: It’s going to be a lot of work, but I know we can get it done with you on our side.

clean_body: | | | I wanted to be the first person to reach out and welcome you to the team, Derek. The Democratic Party of Virginia is made up of some of the most committed and most fired-up people I’ve ever worked with, and we’re pumped to have you! We had some great successes over the past few years: 2017: We flipped 15 House seats in the General Assembly -- Virginia’s largest electoral shift since 1899. 2018: We re-elected Senator Tim Kaine and flipped 3 congressional districts , sending three first-time Congresswomen -- Elaine Luria, Jennifer Wexton, and Abigail Spanberger -- to Washington. 2019: We ran the most aggressive coordinated campaign in the history of our Commonwealth -- flipping both chambers of the General Assembly and giving Democrats trifecta control of state government for the first time in over 25 years. 2020: We sent Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to the White House in a resounding repudiation of Donald Trump. And we re-elected our entire Congressional delegation of Democrats and Senator Mark Warner -- all in the midst of a raging pandemic. But the work doesn’t stop here. Virginia has elections every year \-- and in 2021 the top positions of governor, lieutenant governor, and attorney general are all up for grabs. Unfortunately, Virginia also has a long history of electing governors from the party that just lost the White House. And you can bet the Republicans are going to fight their hardest to keep that trend alive. I won’t lie: It’s going to be a lot of work, but I know we can get it done with you on our side. Want to get more involved? or follow us on , , and for all the latest news and updates from DPVA. name: Nuestro PAC
subject: Let's catch up!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nuestro PAC
body:
2020 was a big year for Nuestro PAC. Here's what we've been up to since then.
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31216383/291959137/1999088365?refcopde=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZjOTY1ZjFhLTc3ZDMtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fSrXnxnpeK0fjBDfNoMGdKXsvukW6U5IQFjgUhB-m7k=)

Friends -
Latinos in 2020 voted in BIG numbers for Joe Biden & Kamala Harris. This election showed that if politicians and party organizations speak to Latinos in their language and in a culturally competent way, our community comes out to vote.

We want to take a moment to share our achievements in 2020 and why it is crucial for us to count on your support in 2022.

If you know our history and are ready to chip in, use this link:
[**Make a contribution -- of any amount you can afford -- to Nuestro PAC.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31216386/291959152/-1551089125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZjOTY1ZjFhLTc3ZDMtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fSrXnxnpeK0fjBDfNoMGdKXsvukW6U5IQFjgUhB-m7k=)
**In 2020, Nuestro PAC:**
* Became the nation's largest independent Latino-focused Super PAC
* Raised a total of $10 million with our partners to run programs and operations
* Created a new database of over 2,000 individual donors
* Won races in Arizona, Michigan, Pennsylvania and Nevada as a result of our spending efforts and strategic partnerships

**NUESTRO RESEARCH**

After the general election and Georgia runoffs, we administered over 5,000 interviews with former presidential campaign staffers, activists, candidates, consultants and state organizations, in addition to coordinating bilingual post-election polling, in the Rio Grande Valley and Miami-Dade County to understand why Latinos shifted toward Republicans so dramatically in these areas. We found that investing early was vital for Republicans to grow considerable support from the Latino community in both areas.

Democrats at all levels underperformed with Latinos even though they spent more money than any previous election on outreach to these voters. The reasons why boil down to outreach starting too late to have a decisive impact on voters’ decision-making.

**NUESTRO PLAN**

Nuestro PAC aims to build and implement infrastructure that is desperately needed to organize in Latino communities early. That’s why we’re running tests in special elections during 2021 to ensure our communications strategies effectively ramp up in 2022. We’re using regional messaging based on state-specific issues so our ads actually relate to the issues Latinos face within their communities.

**NUESTRO FUTURE**

We know that the only way Democrats will keep and grow their majorities in the U.S. House and Senate is by connecting with Latino voters in an effective and culturally competent way. We aim to accomplish exactly that.

**[If you're able, please consider chipping in $10 to Nuestro PAC. Anything you contribute today will go a long way in supporting Democrats running for office up and down the ballot in 2021, 2022 and beyond.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31216388/291959170/-1551089125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZjOTY1ZjFhLTc3ZDMtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fSrXnxnpeK0fjBDfNoMGdKXsvukW6U5IQFjgUhB-m7k=)**

Thank you for your support.
Chuck Rocha
[**CONTRIBUTE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31216389/291959187/-1551089125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZjOTY1ZjFhLTc3ZDMtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fSrXnxnpeK0fjBDfNoMGdKXsvukW6U5IQFjgUhB-m7k=)

* * *

Paid for by Nuestro PAC

. To make a contribution to support Nuestro PAC's critical work, please **[use this link](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31216391/291959202/1999088365?refcopde=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZjOTY1ZjFhLTc3ZDMtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fSrXnxnpeK0fjBDfNoMGdKXsvukW6U5IQFjgUhB-m7k=)**.

name: Team Cammack
subject: Far-Left policies are designed to control
body:
Only in a country like America could someone like Kat go from homelessness to the House of Representatives in less than a decade.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WGHyuWjoBoxsOLAhG_t__i08Dgc1IZqKisLZzkZ8dcmPDOEt-U1lVfSi3eReX03V3GUNhC2dzIC5OyP58h0q2-revK2cidFl6FS10yn_E9zi8rTKaxNx5rNQFYjnGnfL_rZY5RD3QMsQHd9PEbA0jYypyZ3-HBTepGOg63vC6VDBsHwhWv9hbdsLP5HdkjtchqyDBlSzy6XiB2sjFbJs05Jf5ZPwHvco&c=_hlBN-pG2Uz_uhAHm_1o52NgrYRV9spZnSUVS5J6JxjhE1SqyToTxQ==&ch=7pIFQ13yRfiOCg9lgoOGy41W2j8YERGS0j51bIoXH6QzooNhvcXc7w==)
---
| Friend,

Only in a country like America could someone like Kat go from homelessness to the House of Representatives in less than a decade. It's time for a fundamental re-approach to the way we handle homelessness and the opioid epidemic, and the Republican Party needs to lead the way.
---
| | | [READ THE ARTICLE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WGHyuWjoBoxsOLAhG_t__i08Dgc1IZqKisLZzkZ8dcmPDOEt-U1lVfSi3eReX03V3GUNhC2dzIC5OyP58h0q2-revK2cidFl6FS10yn_E9zi8rTKaxNx5rNQFYjnGnfL_rZY5RD3QMsQHd9PEbA0jYypyZ3-HBTepGOg63vC6VDBsHwhWv9hbdsLP5HdkjtchqyDBlSzy6XiB2sjFbJs05Jf5ZPwHvco&c=_hlBN-pG2Uz_uhAHm_1o52NgrYRV9spZnSUVS5J6JxjhE1SqyToTxQ==&ch=7pIFQ13yRfiOCg9lgoOGy41W2j8YERGS0j51bIoXH6QzooNhvcXc7w==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WGHyuWjoBoxsOLAhG_t__i08Dgc1IZqKisLZzkZ8dcmPDOEt-U1lVfSi3eReX03VzJKTgnzhlVrJiwzQ0p1X3BrEw4pfU9auSkirtb8kK0aJSuIwkz_IBRRlfJ7Tm2E1b0Sa5OeXXxcnm-01xBNToNKJERulBy87ukMIqLT46FxrdPrTTz4r0lo0QzWm0dhuOGNu3KVOEngCDKlE-V_PcW93atM_XV3L0vBoV2ZEIvBAdlXnkbLtsA==&c=_hlBN-pG2Uz_uhAHm_1o52NgrYRV9spZnSUVS5J6JxjhE1SqyToTxQ==&ch=7pIFQ13yRfiOCg9lgoOGy41W2j8YERGS0j51bIoXH6QzooNhvcXc7w==)
---
| Due to Obama's policies, Kat's family lost their small family cattle ranch, which left them homeless. While this experience was a significant burden, Kat's battle with homelessness wasn't solved through handouts, but hand-ups that enabled her family to pull themselves up by their bootstraps.
It's time to put America First, which means helping our fellow citizens that are battling homelessness and drug addictions by providing them a path forward to lift themselves up.
The Radical Left wants to have exclusivity on this issue, but our policies are better than theirs, which is why we have to get focused on the issues of America's most vulnerable. Can Kat count on you to contribute today to help us get focused on helping America's destitute?

clean_body: Only in a country like America could someone like Kat go from homelessness to the House of Representatives in less than a decade. | | | | | | == | Friend, Only in a country like America could someone like Kat go from homelessness to the House of Representatives in less than a decade. It's time for a fundamental re-approach to the way we handle homelessness and the opioid epidemic, and the Republican Party needs to lead the way. | | | == | == | Due to Obama's policies, Kat's family lost their small family cattle ranch, which left them homeless. While this experience was a significant burden, Kat's battle with homelessness wasn't solved through handouts, but hand-ups that enabled her family to pull themselves up by their bootstraps. It's time to put America First, which means helping our fellow citizens that are battling homelessness and drug addictions by providing them a path forward to lift themselves up. The Radical Left wants to have exclusivity on this issue, but our policies are better than theirs, which is why we have to get focused on the issues of America's most vulnerable. Can Kat count on you to contribute today to help us get focused on helping America's destitute? | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | For Florida, Team Cammack | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Reaching out respectfully for $3
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Can you spare a few bucks ahead of our federally mandated end-of-quarter fundraising deadline?
#

Friend,
I’m reaching out to ask you to donate $3 to our campaign before our federally mandated end-of-quarter fundraising deadline next Wednesday.
Will you give me a moment to explain why your $3 is so important? Here’s the short of it:
1. Pennsylvania is the #1 most important Senate race in the country
2. That’s because the fate of our Senate majority hangs in the balance
3. So the race is super competitive (_and expensive_) already
4. And it’s going to take a lot of resources to replace Republican Pat Toomey with a Democrat who will fight for working families next fall

[If that’s all you need to know, will you make that $3 contribution to help us build an unstoppable coalition of working folks to win this race? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31216808/291960785/-347207331?refcode2=22240aa0-78d3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210622-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjI0MGFhMC03OGQzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v8GWGUrZfbNpUcwGRTj2SWOuF1PaIO9M2RAWszAk7h0=)
**[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31216809/291960786/-347207331?refcode2=22240aa0-78d3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210622-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjI0MGFhMC03OGQzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v8GWGUrZfbNpUcwGRTj2SWOuF1PaIO9M2RAWszAk7h0=)**
Our strategy to win this race is simple.
We must rally a huge coalition of working people behind our progressive agenda centered on racial, economic, and environmental justice that works for working people.
But do you want to know the key to our strategy? _It's you._
That’s because donations from real working people like you are what fund our work.
Your support helps me share my story of growing up dirt poor in the North Philly projects and helps fuel our grassroots organizing efforts across the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania.
[That’s why I’m asking for your $3 today. If you can spare a few bucks ahead of our federally mandated end-of-quarter fundraising deadline next week, it would mean so much.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31216810/291960787/-347207331?refcode2=22240aa0-78d3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210622-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjI0MGFhMC03OGQzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v8GWGUrZfbNpUcwGRTj2SWOuF1PaIO9M2RAWszAk7h0=)
**[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31216811/291960788/-347207331?refcode2=22240aa0-78d3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210622-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjI0MGFhMC03OGQzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v8GWGUrZfbNpUcwGRTj2SWOuF1PaIO9M2RAWszAk7h0=)**
Thanks for being a part of our fight to build a government that works for working people.
Malcolm

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31217170/291962167/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDM5YmVlOS03OWQzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DChDfRkdP6eGXu8VhTIjQn3cHeKQhmnu4xMg8GYTtJw=&emci=2016c4e8-d7d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f439bee9-79d3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek,

Virginia's statewide election this November represents a clear choice between continuing the progress we have made as a Commonwealth these last few years and turning the clock back to the disaster of Trumpism. **[That's why I'm emailing you again today to ask you to join me in supporting Attorney General Mark Herring.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31217171/291962168/-1328635965?refcode=ris_20210622_e_f_us_na_na_herringnd&refcode2=cont&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDM5YmVlOS03OWQzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DChDfRkdP6eGXu8VhTIjQn3cHeKQhmnu4xMg8GYTtJw=)**

Attorney General Herring has been on the front lines of defending the rights of Virginians. He helped lead the fight against the Trump administration's assault on the Affordable Care Act. He stood up to the NRA and championed common sense gun safety laws. And he's made sure the Attorney General's office is on the side of justice on issues including criminal justice reform, environmental protection, and the opioid crisis.

body:

| | Derek,

In case you missed it:

On Monday, Republicans gathered outside Senator Maggie Hassan's office in Manchester to demand that she _REJECT S.1_.

Sen. Hassan has voiced her support for a bill which would put DC in control of our elections, and force taxpayers to fund political campaigns.

She has never been more out of touch with Granite State values, and [we need your help to defeat her in 2022](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fretire-hassan/2/0100017a33d7b987-3c0efeb1-a71e-4e6a-9401-6c77fe911237-000000/H5rKrZFi1daqPAvANnoqh48n9oY=219).

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: URGENT: One crucial way Congress can stop failing women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
3,000. That was the number of untested rape kits sitting in evidence rooms and crime labs across Pennsylvania when I was elected Auditor General. I saw in that number 3,000 victims of rape who had the courage to willingly subject themselves to an invasive and uncomfortable medical examination in the pursuit of justice and to protect others from their assailants. Instead, we failed them. We failed the people who loved them and watched them suffer. We compounded that failure by allowing violent predators to do it again and again, creating countless new victims.

Friend, 3,000. That was the number of untested rape kits sitting in evidence rooms and crime labs across Pennsylvania when I was elected Auditor General. I saw in that number 3,000 victims of rape who had the courage to willingly subject themselves to an invasive and uncomfortable medical examination in the pursuit of justice and to protect others from their assailants. Instead, we failed them. We failed the people who loved them and watched them suffer. We compounded that failure by allowing violent predators to do it again and again, creating countless new victims. **_There is no good reason for thousands upon thousands of untested rape kits to linger for years —_ __even decades__ _— in police evidence lockers and crime labs. So I did something about it._** [Sign your name and demand Congress end the rape kit backlog!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31219447/291970565/-505158984?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmJhZjE1YS03ZWQzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PYYOXrkQcxKauPz9NbBt9qBBnchp5OcxqWfSjpqazPg=&emci=2aa31062-5dd3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4fbaf15a-7ed3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10203249) Reducing the number of Pennsylvania's untested rape kits from more than 3,000 to 94 during my two terms as Pennsylvania's Auditor General is one of the things I'm most proud of. While 94 untested rape kits are still 94 too many, here in Pennsylvania we proved we _can_ solve real problems that affect people's lives. [The national backlog of untested rape kits — which is believed to be in the hundreds of thousands — tells victims of sexual assault their pain and their lives don't matter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31219448/291970566/-505158984?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmJhZjE1YS03ZWQzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PYYOXrkQcxKauPz9NbBt9qBBnchp5OcxqWfSjpqazPg=&emci=2aa31062-5dd3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4fbaf15a-7ed3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10203249) It silences victims and discourages them from reporting these crimes to law enforcement. Even worse, it tells predators and rapists their crimes have no consequences. **How did we get here? From Scranton to San Diego, it's the same story. Not enough money, poor communications between state health departments and law enforcement, outdated lab policies, lack of training, and far too often, a lack of leadership that's focused on solving problems with dogged persistence.** Right now, few state governments and NO federal agencies even bother to keep track of the untested kits at all. This is a problem we can solve. This is a problem we MUST solve and we're going to have to do it together. [**_This is a national problem that needs a national solution. Will you add your name and demand that our elected representative pass comprehensive rape kit testing legislation?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31219450/291970568/-505158984?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmJhZjE1YS03ZWQzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PYYOXrkQcxKauPz9NbBt9qBBnchp5OcxqWfSjpqazPg=&emci=2aa31062-5dd3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4fbaf15a-7ed3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10203249) Thank you, Eugene

clean_body: 3,000. That was the number of untested rape kits sitting in evidence rooms and crime labs across Pennsylvania when I was elected Auditor General. I saw in that number 3,000 victims of rape who had the courage to willingly subject themselves to an invasive and uncomfortable medical examination in the pursuit of justice and to protect others from their assailants. Instead, we failed them. We failed the people who loved them and watched them suffer. We compounded that failure by allowing violent predators to do it again and again, creating countless new victims. Friend, 3,000. That was the number of untested rape kits sitting in evidence rooms and crime labs across Pennsylvania when I was elected Auditor General. I saw in that number 3,000 victims of rape who had the courage to willingly subject themselves to an invasive and uncomfortable medical examination in the pursuit of justice and to protect others from their assailants. Instead, we failed them. We failed the people who loved them and watched them suffer. We compounded that failure by allowing violent predators to do it again and again, creating countless new victims. There is no good reason for thousands upon thousands of untested rape kits to linger for years — even decades — in police evidence lockers and crime labs. So I did something about it. Reducing the number of Pennsylvania's untested rape kits from more than 3,000 to 94 during my two terms as Pennsylvania's Auditor General is one of the things I'm most proud of. While 94 untested rape kits are still 94 too many, here in Pennsylvania we proved we can solve real problems that affect people's lives. It silences victims and discourages them from reporting these crimes to law enforcement. Even worse, it tells predators and rapists their crimes have no consequences. How did we get here? From Scranton to San Diego, it's the same story. Not enough money, poor communications between state health departments and law enforcement, outdated lab policies, lack of training, and far too often, a lack of leadership that's focused on solving problems with dogged persistence. Right now, few state governments and NO federal agencies even bother to keep track of the untested kits at all. This is a problem we can solve. This is a problem we MUST solve and we're going to have to do it together. name: John Fetterman
subject: Open for a photo of my mullet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
You may like Wawa more than Sheetz, but send me to the U.S. Senate and I’ll fight for *all* of yinz.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210622-1808-header&t=1&akid=1808%2E434096%2ECKBr5e)
Peter,
I’m gonna talk about growing up in Pennsylvania, but first, I have to ask: [**_Will you please donate _**** _$5 for the first time before our end-of-quarter deadline on June 30? I’m so grateful for your support (even if you think Wawa > Sheetz)._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20815?refcode=em20210622-1808&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1808%2E434096%2ECKBr5e)
Ok, now on to the good stuff. I was born in Reading, Pennsylvania, when my parents were just two teenagers starting out on their own. I love my parents — even if my wife, Gisele, is their favorite. 😂
We started out struggling. My dad was a union grocery worker at ShopRite, working night shifts. **The union way of life helped keep our family together while he went to college.** Dad graduated, got a good job as an underwriter, and we moved to suburban south central Pennsylvania.
I loved being a big brother to my three younger siblings, Rob, Gregg, and Kristin. We share a lot of memories from growing up in Pennsylvania throughout the years, from evacuating during the Three Mile Island crisis as kids in 1979, to hiding stashes of Hershey chocolate from our parents.
When I left Pennsylvania for grad school, **I *never* envisioned myself ending up in public service** — not as Mayor of Braddock for 15 years, not as Governor Wolf’s Anger Translator (aka Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania), and certainly not as a candidate for the U.S. Senate.
Apparently, I also *never* envisioned myself getting a haircut. 👇
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20815?refcode=em20210622-1808&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1808%2E434096%2ECKBr5e)
But I came back to Pennsylvania because that's where my heart is. Gisele and I are raising our kids in Braddock, right across the street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill. **I have dedicated my life to improving our Commonwealth.**
When marriage equality was still unjustly illegal, I was the *first* public official in Pennsylvania to officiate same-sex marriages.
Since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, Pennsylvania has seen a 500% increase in clemency applications and commuted more deserving lifers in the past two years than in the previous 25 years combined.
And every time the flag police come to take down my legal weed + pride flags, I put them right back up — and I’m just gonna keep doing that.
[**_Peter, if that’s the kind of never-give-up attitude you want to see in the U.S. Senate, can you chip in your first donation of $5? To be successful, we’re gonna need to build a huge campaign across all 67 counties in Pennsylvania._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20815?refcode=em20210622-1808&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=1808%2E434096%2ECKBr5e)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20815?refcode=em20210622-1808&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1808%2E434096%2ECKBr5e)**
You may like Wawa more than Sheetz. You may say #FlyEaglesFly while I say #HereWeGo. But help send me to the U.S. Senate and I’ll fight for *all* of yinz, just like I’ve been fighting for Pennsylvania my whole life.
Thanks,
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210622-1808-footer&t=24&refcode2=1808_434096_CKBr5e&akid=1808%2E434096%2ECKBr5e)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=1808%2E434096%2ECKBr5e)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1808%2E434096%2ECKBr5e)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Rand Paul
subject: Announcement: This could destroy the Biden Presidency
body:
Friend,

**Only one thing is stopping Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer from implementing their radical agenda - our hold on the Senate. **

They are already plotting their 2022 election plans to expand their majority...

Fortunately, my friend Mike Gibbons could foil all of their plans.

Mike Gibbons is running for Senate in an open seat in Ohio that Biden and Harris DESPERATELY need to win if they wish to keep the Senate in 2022.

[**ANNOUNCEMENT: I am personally endorsing my friend, Mike Gibbons, for Senate in Ohio! Please rush a donation of $20.22, $50, $100, or even more to his campaign today!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bf55b5b1b9f6434595165b99234fb361&_e=iIP4CQ0CShdx93WNOZm6mtdSk6LeeeSxn4ybwUPDHEm8TcWYHaIZ_PSg06T7qLEJUsj7FCvcvNWmbejFAaijLQYG-V_8FfG0vGLI0AEtrzilxQ-aHGhNRk7oN3K7WHzjUufdrHD7xD50p60MYAR32MZ1hZEJUROGMsjO2_tLzrvf_EzYVcmGrvs4lJHyqGRcxHZfjpSHjdRrTNDn8HL71gQBsxLDg0_NQdeKKFnP0BP80suBCmeHDAnGsMTID6W4FoZ0MLm6fga-w0PRpnWRzMSrvTXzxLjzAOvvyv-4i00%3D)

I am personally endorsing Mike Gibbons because he is fighting for our shared values and he is a man of principle.
* Putting an END to Critical Race Theory and cancel culture
* Fighting for an America-First agenda
* Securing our borders
* Standing up for the Second Amendment and for the rights of the unborn

You know what I like most about Mike Gibbons? **He is not a politician and has worked hard all of his life and achieved the American Dream. **

Growing up he had a paper route. Later, he operated a bandsaw on a factory floor in Ohio. He poured concrete. He sacrificed and worked hard to create a livelihood and provide for his family.

It wasn’t until age 37 he opened up his own business above a dentist’s office. Since then, Mike Gibbons has achieved success beyond his wildest dreams.

Now, he’s decided to run for Senate to fight for the Bill of Rights, an America-First agenda, and for liberty.

What’s at stake? The left is attempting to rewrite American history, silence our voices, and control our schools.

The reality is I need back up in the U.S. Senate against Biden and his cronies to stop this madness.

[**I am asking all of my supporters to send Mike Gibbons the most generous contribution you can. I gave Mike my word I would help him raise $50,000.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bf55b5b1b9f6434595165b99234fb361&_e=iIP4CQ0CShdx93WNOZm6mtdSk6LeeeSxn4ybwUPDHEm8TcWYHaIZ_PSg06T7qLEJUsj7FCvcvNWmbejFAaijLUOu_tqLMPxDE-UVazWR2ggEWTRKNX6AvtP2yA1krfDbbXHtKUY13iLuug5Nlt9-GUXyx1hT1qT0jGyqc6tNY0vpdTUZVpHroVDfhlFU-4Nh8SzYffkGPWnTAOa888Zo7r7LYnDObWVJorzQjAkyXBp_U8SRrAkdABpXqzala6cvnOtxJTHk1uAyubYXc8UZU6L75kkLMCccUw-ofovXciw%3D)

**[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bf55b5b1b9f6434595165b99234fb361&_e=iIP4CQ0CShdx93WNOZm6mtdSk6LeeeSxn4ybwUPDHEm8TcWYHaIZ_PSg06T7qLEJUsj7FCvcvNWmbejFAaijLfd7fc3ufJJYcb2uuHYTjWm4Qx8LCrTjjF_iCDTufssWY-eEbT7HpLnXBGJf4HajwGJdVcvZ0J6fNNag5AwgC532vKLr4k5vDuc6roMwOIegyDaSSUChR6XIbXhFDaX8_j_Kyb88Bv1jggxiBx2c71Xw5xnGJHEthes3zOC5tGPVxkuqGf_0VS43iGTRQUXi1nl2KYRvy6FV-pIALj3XvyY%3D)**

Biden is dumping TENS OF MILLIONS of dollars into this open Senate seat. Winning the Ohio Senate seat is an essential part of their plan and we have the chance to stop them.

clean_body: Friend, Only one thing is stopping Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer from implementing their radical agenda - our hold on the Senate. They are already plotting their 2022 election plans to expand their majority... Fortunately, my friend Mike Gibbons could foil all of their plans. Mike Gibbons is running for Senate in an open seat in Ohio that Biden and Harris DESPERATELY need to win if they wish to keep the Senate in 2022. I am personally endorsing Mike Gibbons because he is fighting for our shared values and he is a man of principle. Putting an END to Critical Race Theory and cancel culture Fighting for an America-First agenda Securing our borders Standing up for the Second Amendment and for the rights of the unborn You know what I like most about Mike Gibbons? He is not a politician and has worked hard all of his life and achieved the American Dream. Growing up he had a paper route. Later, he operated a bandsaw on a factory floor in Ohio. He poured concrete. He sacrificed and worked hard to create a livelihood and provide for his family. It wasn’t until age 37 he opened up his own business above a dentist’s office. Since then, Mike Gibbons has achieved success beyond his wildest dreams. Now, he’s decided to run for Senate to fight for the Bill of Rights, an America-First agenda, and for liberty. What’s at stake? The left is attempting to rewrite American history, silence our voices, and control our schools. The reality is I need back up in the U.S. Senate against Biden and his cronies to stop this madness. Biden is dumping TENS OF MILLIONS of dollars into this open Senate seat. Winning the Ohio Senate seat is an essential part of their plan and we have the chance to stop them. Electing Mike to the Senate could destroy Joe Biden’s chances of passing ANY of his left-wing agenda after the election. Please consider this an urgent and personal request of mine. I’m counting on your help to elect Mike Gibbons to the Senate. Thank you, Friend. Senator Rand Paul

Tshibaka had previously launched the first television advertisement of the 2022 campaign and this new ad will be incorporated into her existing buy, which is on local broadcast stations and cable television outlets in Alaska.

“President Trump fought for Alaska, but Lisa Murkowski – someone who’s supposed to fight for Alaska – stopped fighting for us years ago,” a narrator says in the ad. “That’s why President Trump has endorsed Kelly Tshibaka for United States Senate.”

Murkowski refused to support President Trump in 2016 and 2020 and enabled Joe Biden’s radical agenda to end drilling and kill Alaska jobs. She voted to allow illegal immigrants to remain in the country, voted against commonsense federal judges, voted to keep Obamacare, and voted to remove President Trump from office even though his term had already expired. Because of her record, Murkowski has been censured by the Republican Party of Alaska and instructed not to refer to herself as a Republican in the state any longer.

Tshibaka has rallied Alaskans who are looking for a new generation of leaders and is running on principles which reflect Alaska values.

“She’s conservative, pro-2nd Amendment, pro-Alaskan energy, America First,” the ad’s narrator continues. “Kelly Tshibaka will fight for us.”

Born and raised in Alaska, Tshibaka has spent her career exposing fraud and abuse in government and served as Commissioner of Administration for Alaska Gov. Mike Dunleavy from January 2019 until she stepped down to run for the Senate. Tshibaka’s father was a union electrician and Vietnam War veteran, and her mother was one of the first workers at the startup of Prudhoe Bay, one of Alaska's large oil fields. Her parents were homeless for a time in the 1970s but fought their way into the middle class.

Tshibaka graduated from Steller Secondary School in Anchorage and was the first in her family to pursue a college degree, beginning her studies at the University of Alaska Anchorage before graduating from college and law school. She lives in Anchorage with her husband, Niki, and their five children.

name: Giffords.org
subject: 5 years ago today Congressman John Lewis organized a House sit-in to stop gun violence and pass universal background checks
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends - today is an important anniversary in the movement against gun violence.
Five years ago today, the late Congressman John Lewis led gun-safety leaders in a surprise sit-in of the House chamber to push Congress to allow for debate and votes on essential background checks legislation — just ten days after 49 people were killed in the Pulse shooting in Orlando.
Gun safety leaders from both the House and Senate clustered in the House chamber for over a day, reading the names of Americans killed senselessly by gun violence.
The sad truth is that still, five years later, universal background checks have not been signed into law.
Since the House sit-in of 2016, hundreds of thousands of Americans have tragically lost their lives to gun violence. Many deaths could have been prevented if universal background checks had been signed into law.
So, we need to ask you today:
[**Will you make a $3 donation today to help us urge the Senate to pass universal background checks? Your support, along with others, will help us pass this bill and save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21&amount=3&refcode=em210622-1-subs?t=1&refcode2=251_3935704__Q_oV1&akid=251%2E3935704%2E_Q_oV1)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210622-1-subs&t=14&refcode2=251_3935704__Q_oV1&akid=251%2E3935704%2E_Q_oV1)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210622-1-subs&t=15&refcode2=251_3935704__Q_oV1&akid=251%2E3935704%2E_Q_oV1)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210622-1-subs&t=17&refcode2=251_3935704__Q_oV1&akid=251%2E3935704%2E_Q_oV1)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210622-1-subs&t=18&refcode2=251_3935704__Q_oV1&akid=251%2E3935704%2E_Q_oV1)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210622-1-subs&t=19&refcode2=251_3935704__Q_oV1&akid=251%2E3935704%2E_Q_oV1)**
---
****
It’s incomprehensible that allies of the NRA in Congress are still doing everything they can to prevent a vote in the Senate on universal background checks, even though almost 90% of Americans support the legislation.
Universal background checks will protect responsible gun owners and save the lives of countless Americans who could be put in harm’s way.
Passing this legislation is long overdue. With your donation, we’ll do the hard work to get the Senate to vote on and pass universal background checks. We now have a gun safety majority in the House, Senate, and a president in Congress who has pledged to make the fight against gun violence a top administration priority.
We’re closer than ever, and with your help, we’ll get universal background checks signed into law.
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21?refcode=em210622-1-subs&t=20&refcode2=251_3935704__Q_oV1&akid=251%2E3935704%2E_Q_oV1)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=251%2E3935704%2E_Q_oV1) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: If I lose, the GOP will take back the majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I didn’t want to send you this | | |
---
Hi, everyone. Emailing to ask for money is one of my least favorite things to do, but we’re in a sticky spot. We still have a significant gap in our fundraising, and our public reporting deadline is coming up. **Falling short will invite a deluge of misleading attack ads designed to defeat me. And in a swing state like New Hampshire, they just might work.** Political operatives are calling me the most vulnerable Democrat up for re-election. If I lose, the GOP will take back the majority. That’s why we need to scramble to fill the hole: **[Please, donate $5 or as much as you can to protect New Hampshire’s vulnerable Senate seat and our Democratic majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31222475/291981466/1251890980?refcode=e20210622_mh-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTlmNTA3ZC04N2QzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J1YGBS7eP3SkFrvVErNgKdEt4zGj-1sFNPh98IGa420=)** I am so appreciative of anything you can give today, and I couldn’t be more grateful to have you with me. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: **Maggie Hassan**
Date: Mon, Jun 21, 2021
Subject: I'd rather not send this email Hi there, I'd really prefer not to send you emails asking for money. My focus continues to be fighting for hard-working families like yours in the Senate. However, I'm reaching out today because we're on the verge of lowering our fundraising projections for the second time this month -- we've got a $21,319 gap to fill TODAY. body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I0WdXdq-pQzO16oPE4kLwfyAklIwhGJo31ntmNgFAi121nV73_FovDhA87VoYstzLwOwkTJ06YkqEmNJQYf_I4jPSst0pZN5YEMRe_rEivhQzRPkPkamzLd0CAswgJCn3ZzsR8oOzHxCEarqdAXmFi9l2hlVbyVApxxrMbTTTqFKwNesyv8ISpxN9bxj1Jxp&c=LsSfXmJqwYyDHPMwE67DrlnKoUW6mhPOaE0dVeLlL1klOkRO7t-B1g==&ch=klU3S4sZDJrMM462UJJJuUrIlyYrxjh3qQU4luTxmTn0R2paSLWpYA==)

| Peter,
We shouldn't let Deep State bureaucrats and their media allies obscure the facts or gaslight the American people any longer.
I'm calling on FBI Director Christopher Wray to fully disclose what role his operatives played in the January 6th riot.
The vast number of "unindicted co-conspirators" from the events begs the question - did the same Deep State agents who targeted President Trump at every turn instigate the U.S. Capitol breach?
We deserve full transparency - yet they refuse to release the footage or the facts about this event that has since been used as an attempt to besmirch Trump's entire base of supporters!
---
| | | [DEMAND TRANSPARENCY FROM THE FBI](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I0WdXdq-pQzO16oPE4kLwfyAklIwhGJo31ntmNgFAi121nV73_FovDhA87VoYstzLwOwkTJ06YkqEmNJQYf_I4jPSst0pZN5YEMRe_rEivhQzRPkPkamzLd0CAswgJCn3ZzsR8oOzHxCEarqdAXmFi9l2hlVbyVApxxrMbTTTqFKwNesyv8ISpxN9bxj1Jxp&c=LsSfXmJqwYyDHPMwE67DrlnKoUW6mhPOaE0dVeLlL1klOkRO7t-B1g==&ch=klU3S4sZDJrMM462UJJJuUrIlyYrxjh3qQU4luTxmTn0R2paSLWpYA==)

| I certainly hope that our nation's premier law enforcement organization did not actually work to violate federal law during the events of 1/6.
But it wouldn't be the first time that they've used this playbook...
We need more transparency from the FBI - especially if they are using shady infiltration tactics to try to take down the entire America-First movement.

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Hillary Clinton wants me gone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Peter -- Democrats have recruited Democrat National Committee
Super Delegate Wendy Davis to defeat me in 2022.

DEFEND MARJORIE TAYLOR GREENE - CHIP IN
$25 BEFORE END-OF-QUARTER DEADLINE
Wendy Davis is an open-borders socialist who
supports stimulus checks to Illegal Immigrants, teaching our
children to hate America through dangerous Critical Race Theory
indoctrination, violent BLM and Antifa mobs, and wants to strip
away our gun rights.
She is handpicked by the Hillary
Clinton/Stacey Abrams wing of the Democrat party.
They are prepared to unleash MILLIONS of
dollars to take me out. Some political experts even expect
$15-$20 million spent against me. . .
And not just the Democrats.
The Never Trump Lincoln Project and the Liz
Cheney wing of the Republican party want me gone.

This is exactly why I must ask you to chip in
$25 right now.
And in just eight days, I have one of the
most critical fundraising deadlines in my political career: the
End-of-Quarter reports.

These reports are what Democrat operatives
and Fake News "journalists" comb through just to see how strong
my support is amongst the people.
They use these reports to allocate Democrat
resources amongst the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress.
They even deploy Democrats from across the
country to knock doors, make phone calls, write emails, and
spread Fake News on social media. . .
All in an effort to defeat me in 2022!
As you can see, I strongly need your help,
Peter.
You've stood with me before. I must ask you
to stand with me again right now by chipping in $25 to help
me DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS.
Please hurry, the deadline is just eight days
away!
The bigger my campaign warchest, the bigger
chance I have to fend off Hillary Clinton's and Stacey Abrams'
Democrats.
I am fighting every single day to stop these
socialists in Congress who want to rip this country a part and
rebuild it into their socialist hellhole.
I will never stop fighting. I will never give
up. I will never back down.
hope I can count on you!

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

name: Rand Paul
subject: Announcement: This could destroy the Biden Presidency
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c258%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=FNnR4EJYt4D2l7SLGa73yA&sysid=1)

Friend,

**Only one thing is stopping Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer from implementing their radical agenda - our hold on the Senate. **

They are already plotting their 2022 election plans to expand their majority...

Fortunately, my friend Mike Gibbons could foil all of their plans.

Mike Gibbons is running for Senate in an open seat in Ohio that Biden and Harris DESPERATELY need to win if they wish to keep the Senate in 2022.

[**ANNOUNCEMENT: I am personally endorsing my friend, Mike Gibbons, for Senate in Ohio! Please rush a donation of $20.22, $50, $100, or even more to his campaign today!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4584%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2uR%2bY07VbdKTVUHAhj2%2fEQ&sysid=1)

I am personally endorsing Mike Gibbons because he is fighting for our shared values and he is a man of principle.
* Putting an END to Critical Race Theory and cancel culture
* Fighting for an America-First agenda
* Securing our borders
* Standing up for the Second Amendment and for the rights of the unborn

You know what I like most about Mike Gibbons? **He is not a politician and has worked hard all of his life and achieved the American Dream. **

Growing up he had a paper route. Later, he operated a bandsaw on a factory floor in Ohio. He poured concrete. He sacrificed and worked hard to create a livelihood and provide for his family.

It wasn’t until age 37 he opened up his own business above a dentist’s office. Since then, Mike Gibbons has achieved success beyond his wildest dreams.

Now, he’s decided to run for Senate to fight for the Bill of Rights, an America-First agenda, and for liberty.

What’s at stake? The left is attempting to rewrite American history, silence our voices, and control our schools.

The reality is I need back up in the U.S. Senate against Biden and his cronies to stop this madness.

[**I am asking all of my supporters to send Mike Gibbons the most generous contribution you can. I gave Mike my word I would help him raise $50,000.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4595%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kw6xBVMXsc0itfheIEPZCQ&sysid=1)

**[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4596%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oLKjzxxxB55JDoxG3je0xw&sysid=1)**

Biden is dumping TENS OF MILLIONS of dollars into this open Senate seat. Winning the Ohio Senate seat is an essential part of their plan and we have the chance to stop them.

Electing Mike to the Senate could destroy Joe Biden’s chances of passing ANY of his left-wing agenda after the election.

[**Please become one of my first supporters to answer my call-to-action and send Mike Gibbons a donation of $20.22, $35, $50, $100, $500, or more.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4597%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Oq4UhsNStlijqTCcshJZKg&sysid=1)

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4596%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oLKjzxxxB55JDoxG3je0xw&sysid=1)

Please consider this an urgent and personal request of mine. I’m counting on your help to elect Mike Gibbons to the Senate.

Thank you, Friend.

Senator Rand Paul

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c258%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=FNnR4EJYt4D2l7SLGa73yA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c258%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=FNnR4EJYt4D2l7SLGa73yA&sysid=1)

subject: WE KNEW HE WOULD CAVE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I wish Republicans still had the Senate majority and I weren’t having to write this email to you today... I wish Republicans still had the Senate majority and I weren’t having to write this email to you today... Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=8a03692c355949d8a7e3f710848e7a18&_t=ufPMTREzyVnuhgU5edOJQ8BOITA_4AenkgcDPWtN_DbrG5RmBYTfogB2MaE9mVkAQflEjHGNVVp7ayt4cCef3Rcgcy4AAzRkmjsS2cHtMmmSs_FngIpw1PvYiCLDPhILM2OVO2Awd-t0SMhMRJjIpHrtAvOvHAD4g8cSWErpM3Q%3D)

| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8a03692c355949d8a7e3f710848e7a18&_e=X9ghe3ruMQ7n7FarKvXKsJhYEqMh9n4eEK-2M5wNP_j4KWAJdij0y8rqEKhXrrDrTZUEsIHaEYM9SLgbNXKBYFZLKTICC9w6JAuG15ohlBd_Aup2ZzT1A6RNYaUoie4rz7NXXneXj56xYiVkz-whCzNA1CJtdFSiVJ86vl5pwA5D7ogqAL7g1nktFI8WZLkrKGZU2m_QJ7vtosSfMWpC84nxPpbHBsE2T-X8Z5I22Bu8wCXpW-RQAon8-AMZzdcsDDrY5sczbBCKyWb90eRa9V7kLD9pxhe0P3-01A0Va4MvI7CZZuk-Dn54FB8nInjwtojaNVNv6a5xooeDYbBt7jAX9LhPD67Eng2ksXGS2zLX7AH4FSwWsXE6HgLqkCQQrtBEIzi5VgxyNqp6xlB_3FWULVwpxZOwTPTsrSNlE4fXsj45DIBAvvqM_laAmKll7w4tJxKX18qNms0ayv6i0w%3D%3D)
---

Fellow American,

Our worst fears may be one step closer to becoming a Reality. The “Centrist” Democrat from West Virginia, Joe Manchin, flubbed up on a call with billionaire donors and let it be known that he is in favor of reforming the Senate filibuster.

You might be asking yourself, “Didn’t he go on Fox news and commit to the American people that for the next two years he was a firm NO on filibuster reform?”

Yep – he sure did. **[Here is the clip](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8a03692c355949d8a7e3f710848e7a18&_e=X9ghe3ruMQ7n7FarKvXKsJhYEqMh9n4eEK-2M5wNP_j4KWAJdij0y8rqEKhXrrDrTZUEsIHaEYM9SLgbNXKBYFZLKTICC9w6JAuG15ohlBd_Aup2ZzT1A6RNYaUoie4rz7NXXneXj56xYiVkz-whCzNA1CJtdFSiVJ86vl5pwA5D7ogqAL7g1nktFI8WZLkrKGZU2m_QJ7vtosSfMWpC84nxPpbHBsE2T-X8Z5I22Bu8wCXpW-RQAon8-AMZzdcsE4y1dDFiklsGXN4a1-Kcf7YZKXSm7zgLOvbDDLmK3xdcKykEtA03OMIs0wJAKG1pvKeyEGiY5HIMIQf9jn8tDZLv0b1u3vz2KuFz39mlq6d4Q0aIxwEfAUh75YUOUsm9QxEUPlC4QzJdVmO6aFeBtDDCIpc_2yo0_XQrJZr1itroEtIItbAKqy62dX8s2o7Tx1M_s3TwlCuui965R8oKsg%3D%3D)** :

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8a03692c355949d8a7e3f710848e7a18&_e=X9ghe3ruMQ7n7FarKvXKsJhYEqMh9n4eEK-2M5wNP_j4KWAJdij0y8rqEKhXrrDrTZUEsIHaEYM9SLgbNXKBYFZLKTICC9w6JAuG15ohlBd_Aup2ZzT1A6RNYaUoie4rz7NXXneXj56xYiVkz-whCzNA1CJtdFSiVJ86vl5pwA5D7ogqAL7g1nktFI8WZLkrKGZU2m_QJ7vtosSfMWpC84nxPpbHBsE2T-X8Z5I22Bu8wCXpW-RQAon8-AMZzdcsMvwR-wy0mMV3GKMZRrULIGTrgsIM-XZR_6Ry_hTb_gzq7ITQ6RczA9ZUV2OcYKxHqjLfRP4W-3s2FY6OTW9NvzmyNJooWbMIgWNWAOOHrW00SGff4wy8TUZNm37iiMwF0JLwYgGhKaZezaZs8B70F7niwx_LcRKpX-CZuEyns91pMempUz1t_tbHsu81WRYVfmRCY2z0iqDzTvbRggSsIQ%3D%3D)
| [**WATCH
Manchin On The Record ** **› › **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8a03692c355949d8a7e3f710848e7a18&_e=X9ghe3ruMQ7n7FarKvXKsJhYEqMh9n4eEK-2M5wNP_j4KWAJdij0y8rqEKhXrrDrTZUEsIHaEYM9SLgbNXKBYFZLKTICC9w6JAuG15ohlBd_Aup2ZzT1A6RNYaUoie4rz7NXXneXj56xYiVkz-whCzNA1CJtdFSiVJ86vl5pwA5D7ogqAL7g1nktFI8WZLkrKGZU2m_QJ7vtosSfMWpC84nxPpbHBsE2T-X8Z5I22Bu8wCXpW-RQAon8-AMZzdcsIh_XDcIjVEZ_O8BY92V_2JxzAaviHPOlVmE9eQG2tWwuVbQXeXvWSQ9ROET5iEjdBpTK5J7DjnyX2yYSxxUit2dawD_HraNvFHvmrdPUEjC_5tbDqmPpjoWqIMe8cZykRXCg8t870oVXqVebU9-3im3ZrTaqoSgUtbXaJyO1MLWQ6uG0l9Zcld_sBvA6T5vegSW5nOxWNtksl3h--nnS4Q%3D%3D)
---

First, Manchin was a hard “no” on filibuster reform

Now, he’s opened the door to reducing the 60-vote threshold to 55 votes!

Before too long, he might concede to Chuck Schumer and agree to nuke the filibuster altogether.

Fellow American, we need to mobilize quickly. We’re setting up a fund to run ads against Senate Democrats and save the filibuster.

**The ads we run against Senate Democrats are going to cost, at minimum, $100,000. Can we count on you to make an emergency donation of $5, $50 or even $500 today to fund this project?**
