name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Critical moment for voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend - today, the Senate is voting on moving forward with the For the People Act. This could not be more important, so I wanted to make sure you saw my message over the weekend (included below) about how the filibuster may block progress on protecting voting rights.
For years, Republicans have been orchestrating a nationwide campaign to make it increasingly difficult for people to vote - especially people of color and low-income communities - because they know that when everyone is able to exercise the right to vote, Democrats win. The GOP has decided it's easier to rig our democracy than to earn people's votes. That's why we must take action now to put an end to these targeted voter suppression efforts and pass the For the People Act.
I will never stop fighting to protect the right to vote, but with our democracy on the line, I need you to add your voice right away: **[Sign the petition now to demand the Senate pass the For the People Act and uphold voting rights in the face of the GOP's relentless attacks.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-votingrights?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1045-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0621%3Fcode%3Djtk1045-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Sat, Jun 19, 2021
Subject: re: the filibuster
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=x%2BveBhUvPwD0rjXhlE8l7MgW8o3r4YqX&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
A decade ago now, when I first began my tenure in the Senate, one of my first votes was to eliminate the filibuster. I understood my colleagues' concern - after all, Democrats had spent years in the minority, and they wielded the filibuster as it was institutionally intended: to achieve bipartisan compromise.
But, more recently, I have watched the filibuster bring the Senate to a grinding halt. This institution is no longer functioning as intended. These failures, brought on by the Republican Party's relentless commitment to obstruction, have rendered the filibuster both useless and - much worse - damaging to our country. **[If you believe as strongly as I do that we must get rid of the filibuster, then please add your name to my petition now urging the Senate to eliminate the filibuster for good.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-votingrights?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1045-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0621%3Fcode%3Djtk1045-su-nd)**
We are witnessing the damage in this very moment: Right now, there is an unprecedented Republican-led attack on voting rights. From Florida to Michigan to Texas and beyond, extremist legislators are passing laws to purge voter rolls, curb the ability to vote by mail, and even make it illegal to give _water_ to those waiting in line to vote.
The impetus for all of this is crystal clear: feeding into the Big Lie that Donald Trump was cheated out of the election. Despondent from the massive mobilization of Democratic voters last year, Republicans have decided it is easier to suppress voting rights rather than win fair and square. They are masquerading their anti-democratic efforts as "election security."
**We have a legislative solution to all of these attacks right in front of us: passing the For the People Act to protect and expand voting rights - but Republicans are using the filibuster to block its passage.**
This is not the only significant piece of progress that has been blocked because of the filibuster. Increasing numbers of Senators have come around to filibuster reform because its subversion has been used to block things we **_all_** support and need: from funding for VA hospitals to investment in rebuilding America's aging infrastructure. These are the very things where there _should_ be bipartisan action, but there isn't. Because the Republicans don't want to govern all the people. They want government to fail.
When the Senate's functionality comes to a screeching halt - when we can't pass legislation that protects our fundamental right to vote, then we must look to reform. In the face of right-wing, state-based attacks on our democracy, we should be able to pass the For the People Act with just one Republican crossing the aisle to do the right thing. It's what the majority of Americans want us to do. **There 's no hope of any of that unless we eliminate the filibuster. **
**There is unprecedented grassroots momentum for getting rid of the filibuster, and, today, I need 5,000 members of this team to fuel that momentum by signing my petition:**[Will you add your name right now to urge the Senate- including Democratic colleagues who are currently opposed to this action - to get rid of the filibuster once and for all?**** [ADD MY NAME](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-votingrights?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1045-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0621%3Fcode%3Djtk1045-su-nd) Thus far, not a single Republican Senator has spoken out against the voter suppression tactics happening across the country. In fact, many of my colleagues on the right have _endorsed_ these attacks on the constitutional right to vote. If left unchecked, millions upon millions of voters could be shut out of the ballot box. These attacks are targeted: It's the Americans who turned out for Democrats who will find it more difficult to vote, cementing extremist GOP strongholds on our democracy. You have my word, Friend: I've been fighting with every ounce of energy I have to get the For the People Act passed - and I have hope we can bring at least a few GOP members on board. After all, what could be more important than protecting and expanding the people's ability to vote? It is the most cherished, democratic right in our republic. **But the For the People Act can only get to President Biden 's desk with a simple majority vote. We must eliminate the filibuster. **[So please, sign on to my petition before our 11:59 p.m. deadline urging the Senate to get rid of the filibuster so we can protect voting rights.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-votingrights?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1045-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0621%3Fcode%3Djtk1045-su-nd)**** Thank you for taking action on such a crucial issue. Dick [ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1045-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500) This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=AL9Ya6VzyRzjOcYOs1NI%2BsgW8o3r4YqX&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D) Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Florida is leading the way
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
America needs to follow FL's lead |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2eb2d52645&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

I'm thrilled with the job that Gov. DeSantis is doing here in Florida. He has defended our freedoms, opened our economy, fought Big Tech, and fought Biden.

His last election was close. But the next one won't be. Gov. DeSantis will BLOW OUT THE DEMS because he's proving that America First policies work- and they are popular!

It's time the Republicans in Congress followed suit.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=bbbc52d764&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, a Pelosi sycophant. I nearly beat him last year, and I will win it this year!**

I'm tired of leftist Swampy Republicans like Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger trying to tell us that actual conservative, America First policies lose elections.

That's poppycock.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b9c9c0cac7&e=afa21b7626)
---
| __**By 2020, Ron DeSantis had been governing with America First policies for two years. He kept Florida open and did not impose a mask mandate.**__

**Our economy flourished. People moved here, including President Trump. And we were shining brightly when Blue states like New York and California were taking away people's rights- and failing to control COVID.**

So now, with Florida being the success story of the nation, in 2020 we got REDDER compared to 2016 and 2018. We flipped several House seats (I almost won my own too) and Trump carried the state handily.

In fact, if every state in the Union moved to the right the way Florida did, Trump would have won with 320 electoral votes!

Now, why does this matter? Because it shows that America First policies work, and they are popular. They are popular among Hispanics, among Black voters, among everyone.

And our policies produce results that are hard to beat.

Now if only the Swampy Republicans realized this. BPR notes that many have not.

_Republican Sen. Mitt Romney of Utah on Monday predicted that removing Rep. Liz Cheney from her leadership position as the House Republican Conference chair will cost the party voters and lead to election losses in the 2022 midterms and the 2024 general elections.

“Expelling Liz Cheney from leadership won’t gain the GOP one additional voter, but it will cost us quite a few,” Romney posted on Twitter.

Romney’s comments in support of Cheney come ahead of a vote on Wednesday by the GOP caucus in which she is expected to be ousted from her post after surviving a similar showdown in February. Republican leaders have become increasingly disenchanted with Cheney over her pushback on the party’s strategy to focus on working-class voters under an ‘America First’ platform championed by former President Donald Trump._

Mitt Romney ran for President twice and lost both. Why would we listen to him instead of Trump?

_Help me get to Congress, and I'll aggressively push the America First agenda, just like Gov. DeSantis is doing in Florida. I will bring Florida's success to Capitol Hill!_

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Darren Soto. _I am the guy he's scared of, he wants NO part of seeing me again because our district is trending Red- like our state!_

We need congressmen who will FIGHT the Dems, not vote like them. [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=7f22dab4b6&e=afa21b7626)

The Dems must go! [Help me make America like Florida!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9461a61923&e=afa21b7626)

Fellow American,

Our worst fears may be one step closer to becoming a Reality. The “Centrist” Democrat from West Virginia, Joe Manchin, flubbed up on a call with billionaire donors and let it be known that he is in favor of reforming the Senate filibuster.

You might be asking yourself, “Didn’t he go on Fox news and commit to the American people that for the next two years he was a firm NO on filibuster reform?”

Yep – he sure did. **[Here is the clip](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1866d95178954d788aaaf613c077a357&_e=xxrgzCFP8y-oKH0PfL9rHMXKm5oh7xsoVFzHmIQQFXC8XVo5ujkEnC_rtVlS_1ar6q0Gr2vY2VI38BdS19Y6gc5kC0lNJUVNNXxTd7bRMVp7zPXVte0RO96X0MrNWb3A41Ufywv9xo-C7nkX0TtH0SLPmWCu8n1uJBGbhKNGpa45U_tpleFWb4vLuQ_8_XihXlnBzHVOS8tPBLrbOTpVwdVGROyAzVtZ6-AZKwuUrgXFc-aVi7FbUFj-9lc143wrLAkZHip4Hus8pQKAAJAaHDjZY8HKe9Y3fwLvNwb6nfev0JKiHPHk7gorBL3sRiwZT3qwTiVd3O8nZB2ooABoujkPUEAQKyXtr8559Ouze-P1l8pJnGK7Vy3-WPw7ecS4L-ncmWGaZqe6H7pnirfy4Ktuios2ut3vkFUexDP_5JZrXJcbSapU4PnZ-4RQ-kL2xJ4McFY04fFnxtEGfAOLqQ%3D%3D)** :

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1866d95178954d788aaaf613c077a357&_e=xxrgzCFP8y-oKH0PfL9rHMXKm5oh7xsoVFzHmIQQFXC8XVo5ujkEnC_rtVlS_1ar6q0Gr2vY2VI38BdS19Y6gc5kC0lNJUVNNXxTd7bRMVp7zPXVte0RO96X0MrNWb3A41Ufywv9xo-C7nkX0TtH0SLPmWCu8n1uJBGbhKNGpa45U_tpleFWb4vLuQ_8_XihXlnBzHVOS8tPBLrbOTpVwdVGROyAzVtZ6-AZKwuUrgXFc-aVi7FbUFj-9lc143wr9JYLYyNSiXo8V1EooWFwnGcXap0DrNIMQWYnSuauHN9Hs0HE6MEM444paZP97y3LRbLANeEoTFwfBbpbYptxCKohEij5D-tvtddlSiJDgmkE5F5bqZRxanJbwaxI5tlUTreQkQ0CvRDwkjCZDQM8GC2-8pnTLV0A1OiGYGjtbpf6DUEq7iFBCJdF2Xv92Uvd3MqA3cHLojOU4drUTb2PLw%3D%3D)
| [**WATCH
Manchin On The Record ** **› › **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1866d95178954d788aaaf613c077a357&_e=xxrgzCFP8y-oKH0PfL9rHMXKm5oh7xsoVFzHmIQQFXC8XVo5ujkEnC_rtVlS_1ar6q0Gr2vY2VI38BdS19Y6gc5kC0lNJUVNNXxTd7bRMVp7zPXVte0RO96X0MrNWb3A41Ufywv9xo-C7nkX0TtH0SLPmWCu8n1uJBGbhKNGpa45U_tpleFWb4vLuQ_8_XihXlnBzHVOS8tPBLrbOTpVwdVGROyAzVtZ6-AZKwuUrgXFc-aVi7FbUFj-9lc143wrO-0vkxD8ClJ53NYl7AUsGcJKHcbFa47UuM2yuDTIC_XpSPYqRlCg5UqNK9ijs_I-zJxd6Kldsqo4hogAVftMousYbMpUHuYBLfC-teC1PF81Pl5ORYWdlTMi1YPdaoKxmI__Ihe4S5qJINjYg0-UdqDd537LHwGtPTH12nsjUd9C0C3ZJLzcjC3CMMhsXLuM2C3w2a6imYSsglcZ9VWm7Q%3D%3D)
---

First, Manchin was a hard “no” on filibuster reform

Now, he’s opened the door to reducing the 60-vote threshold to 55 votes!

Before too long, he might concede to Chuck Schumer and agree to nuke the filibuster altogether.

Fellow American, we need to mobilize quickly. We’re setting up a fund to run ads against Senate Democrats and save the filibuster.

**The ads we run against Senate Democrats are going to cost, at minimum, $100,000. Can we count on you to make an emergency donation of $5, $50 or even $500 today to fund this project?**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1866d95178954d788aaaf613c077a357&_e=xxrgzCFP8y-oKH0PfL9rHMXKm5oh7xsoVFzHmIQQFXC8XVo5ujkEnC_rtVlS_1ar6q0Gr2vY2VI38BdS19Y6gc5kC0lNJUVNNXxTd7bRMVp7zPXVte0RO96X0MrNWb3A41Ufywv9xo-C7nkX0TtH0SLPmWCu8n1uJBGbhKNGpa45U_tpleFWb4vLuQ_8_XihXlnBzHVOS8tPBLrbOTpVwdVGROyAzVtZ6-AZKwuUrgXFc-aVi7FbUFj-9lc143wruwbNknxb_4Q0lNpmVyiOrnHkpHYQJ9cYtb5zNPh50jkptQorFd4dSaSB94CnFETQ2OJubohMci3HaDCRgWmgEsomkgA5YY-OhxmiCfpRBuac14kfSGT0_qja50xtBH0k4V1hMA82jQ5dXwtsn6FKv8m3r97GEp-SBm7zxE37JaKm_xWUXWNWSGZBV1uDejpBlaznFYgJs1bBmBfhNLrPwA%3D%3D)
DC statehood, no IDs to vote, federalization of elections, the Green New Deal, American bankruptcy. Without the filibuster, we’re toast.

**[We’re pleading with you to help us fund this campaign](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1866d95178954d788aaaf613c077a357&_e=xxrgzCFP8y-oKH0PfL9rHMXKm5oh7xsoVFzHmIQQFXC8XVo5ujkEnC_rtVlS_1ar6q0Gr2vY2VI38BdS19Y6gc5kC0lNJUVNNXxTd7bRMVp7zPXVte0RO96X0MrNWb3A41Ufywv9xo-C7nkX0TtH0SLPmWCu8n1uJBGbhKNGpa45U_tpleFWb4vLuQ_8_XihXlnBzHVOS8tPBLrbOTpVwdVGROyAzVtZ6-AZKwuUrgXFc-aVi7FbUFj-9lc143wrqAKq-JcFWuQbazGHdm4nljiA49axX4wgky1jZ5cUwsef73H7BQgjEKDMz3NwD3f8eG1kHPfAlEKEVkzGKKYpOnbKv3-t77p6-MFSGMmEy6kBiEH8e05L_35qNj2UoqyXTe2uk8l6vqcZ8TofG6BnGO9QgdjpRnL2Nxk6aKufvOimPKaGHa8o8U3d7QiFGy0m5-S_HGBSHYTmb2zqqKg9NA%3D%3D)** , but time is of the essence. We MUST start airing our ads ASAP.

**[Please be generous with your gifts.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1866d95178954d788aaaf613c077a357&_e=xxrgzCFP8y-oKH0PfL9rHMXKm5oh7xsoVFzHmIQQFXC8XVo5ujkEnC_rtVlS_1ar6q0Gr2vY2VI38BdS19Y6gc5kC0lNJUVNNXxTd7bRMVp7zPXVte0RO96X0MrNWb3A41Ufywv9xo-C7nkX0TtH0SLPmWCu8n1uJBGbhKNGpa45U_tpleFWb4vLuQ_8_XihXlnBzHVOS8tPBLrbOTpVwdVGROyAzVtZ6-AZKwuUrgXFc-aVi7FbUFj-9lc143wrfblHCAjHj5yaSTDGuyjPBt981w9mGtSnRwXaXykZoHia57HQawF1pbZZ2WlHXY7XUAXr_gQRmkI9NfeRSbhY0mTyQ_ORSlgAOCoZdlKoetAHa-daCJ4zLe50qyzoIT4LD5DZzCZq5-Q-a4z3gVtHXe6AZmKskWVlxDvClDtCUuHXz7SIJ7NLydaijqU8FXeLAWoU1gwylYvGaCO5mHXZEQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: I wish Republicans still had the Senate majority and I weren’t having to write this email to you today... I wish Republicans still had the Senate majority and I weren’t having to write this email to you today... Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow American, Our worst fears may be one step closer to becoming a Reality. The “Centrist” Democrat from West Virginia, Joe Manchin, flubbed up on a call with billionaire donors and let it be known that he is in favor of reforming the Senate filibuster. You might be asking yourself, “Didn’t he go on Fox news and commit to the American people that for the next two years he was a firm NO on filibuster reform?” Yep – he sure did. : | First, Manchin was a hard “no” on filibuster reform Now, he’s opened the door to reducing the 60-vote threshold to 55 votes! Before too long, he might concede to Chuck Schumer and agree to nuke the filibuster altogether. Fellow American, we need to mobilize quickly. We’re setting up a fund to run ads against Senate Democrats and save the filibuster. The ads we run against Senate Democrats are going to cost, at minimum, $100,000. Can we count on you to make an emergency donation of $5, $50 or even $500 today to fund this project? DC statehood, no IDs to vote, federalization of elections, the Green New Deal, American bankruptcy. Without the filibuster, we’re toast. , but time is of the essence. We MUST start airing our ads ASAP. Senate Republicans If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: 3 Republican Opponents, 2 Options, 1 Ask
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
Two new Republican candidates announced this month that they are running against Mark in 2022 — that brings us to three opponents total now.
We made history in Arizona when we won in 2020, but now Mark needs your help to hold this seat and secure a full six-year term in the Senate.
This is even more critical now that _The Hill_ and _CNN_ have named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
So we need to keep up the pace in order to hit our 100,000 contribution June fundraising goal and we haven’t brought in as many contributions as we’d hoped today. So here’s the deal:
We need you to become a new supporter to help us get one step closer to hitting our goal.
Normally most first time contributors chip in $5. If you would consider contributing $10 we’ll be where we need to be to hit our goal so we can keep Mark in the Senate.
[**So what do you say? Can you make a $10 donation towards our June fundraising deadline? We need your help to hit our 100,000 contribution goal so we can generate the resources to hold this seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210622-1-15&t=1&refcode2=838_6688874_w4X4ZM&akid=838%2E6688874%2Ew4X4ZM)
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210622-1-15&t=2&refcode2=838_6688874_w4X4ZM&akid=838%2E6688874%2Ew4X4ZM)**
With everyone pitching in just a little more, we’ll hit our goal and be ready for anything that happens, as we work day in and day out to hold this seat and fight for progress that will improve people’s lives.
So thank you in advance for chipping in!
All our best,
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210622-1-15&t=3&refcode2=838_6688874_w4X4ZM&akid=838%2E6688874%2Ew4X4ZM)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=838%2E6688874%2Ew4X4ZM).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

| Dear Friends,
I grew up on a farm in rural Washington and I was raised to respect firearms. My husband and I are instilling those same values in our boys. We teach them to value the rights afforded to us by the Second Amendment, how to shoot and, of course, gun safety.
But sadly, Patty Murray and other DC politicians like her are still dead set on throwing away our constitutional rights.
That is out-of-touch with Washington State - plain and simple. And as your Senator, I will always defend our constitutional rights.

clean_body: ████████████▒ [95% Passed] | Peter, It’s me: Chairman Michael Whatley. Right now the United States Senate is THIS CLOSE to passing a sweeping Democrat takeover of our elections system. This is not a drill. If the Democrats pass this bill, that’s it: Game Over. I wouldn’t be coming to you personally if it weren’t critically important. I need your help, Peter. | | | | | | The truth is that the Democrats are attacking the very foundations of our democracy, Peter. All Republicans want is for our elections to be safe and secure: easy to vote and hard to cheat. But the Left wants to gut every election security measure we have in place! We can’t let that happen. | Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

name: Jake Oakman
subject: Indiana reaches new heights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Under Gov. Holcomb’s leadership, Indiana is taking flight... Hey friend, this is Jake. Are you planning a trip? Ready to take that one you had to postpone last year? With the world getting back to normal, it’s time to hit the friendly skies. **And thanks to Governor Holcomb’s leadership, Hoosiers now have more options than ever:**
* New non-stop routes.
* New airlines.
* Revamped airport experiences.
* Airport improvements.

**As we bounce back from the global pandemic, Indiana is reaching new heights.** _I’ve included a few articles below that highlight how Indiana’s airports are soaring:_ [**[READ] Indy Airport Scores New Nonstop Service to Austin**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=4b24bc94f7c0443980478d5ea2f8f80c&_e=cxKe8FBmUOcltPlKj66pVu7Ttgi-5NsdXdfQS4pfHxg3nhAMsDtNjsnBfaFgc0-CfPa7HcKK6HhtNQBaSi0x-JinllMvVHE0L4AQ12oPbM1004iEMFxQr2-byNSr88PSaPe7TciuDH8RYgOCE8uv54Ozh674is9pYdbUCwbZRWV-gepcPNiW3xkEFnnhJ08TyS2Tdt6DxwtG1rXeHUsS_GLof_6HtZt6z4ib2Sa0P01QayvAbyPkg22mAoXBs0lxWVBhYhtCS2WwcKeABz9urVXUAF2Vg18pUCHABwAd1eoNogmtHvfsxOJ7OUBsW-JbuGuBzP_8JbLNvEQaiK4liBDJ-oS-TUM2JA1fxBhpgQzkbgsmwUsiLBIFtVGMAEPjX7WGeXLSSn1319b4qje5Clx-lDwUnhsYOtMU8OokuQ41d1d6B00DkPc4KV4mzZkfwTr-f4wBIYQX-dmJgeHsDpfX3NxBzexDTmNkv9NDG06aqymH09nppAC3_UWTlHz7lywEPtzE-IMY9D4MzGqSW5HDwtSLIdBMi413pcp8P9w%3D) **The bottom line:**_“This is a triple win for Hoosier travelers. In addition to getting our own residents out to Sun Country’s strong network of vacation destinations, this also provides an affordable option for visitors to experience why Indy has been named a 2021 best place to travel by both Condé Nast Traveler and Travel + Leisure.”_ _—_ Leonard Hoops, President and Chief Executive Officer of Visit Indy, Building Indiana [**[READ] Gary Airport Gets $3.5 Million to Finish Improvements**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=4b24bc94f7c0443980478d5ea2f8f80c&_e=cxKe8FBmUOcltPlKj66pVmG4YqgaKJmQnakfBmdLZIVdhl2TXp4MSS5iRyDoz0i1Fz1yyP3WOJ5uhZsRncja4mhHndnLT8DKGRdaKZiJ4qbr-tGQAWvSNH5s8K-ZxIykvBiMujk5PD4KfQjJMnjDhQ80I3im4hVtz2n53sjVNqTrwjC3sn6-WDpSR_PS2ucLGbNNjPvgVExg4lR8-L8fep3NTOSToAzYBE0Cp3XUhs1LauhjGlMGJ5sJ3iG9OA4394eyHbV6Dti8UuuHbFHMGTZJlj9LqUoQDiW3iz-TT1j8Vg_-ibk8jiguEaoxx1iF7RC-JNwJ7MaLXus46GauwtE3DG_-R5lJcy6Q8ZXnxDSGXPDMrevcb13PB-I8xs-JaY0UFT86xeOceQtzDK4eIbbAEdDcYHXCXVbJ56FhwtH3_s3qCeye97g1dRcROsqXp1ubkw5Maa4d1Rm1vUoN_oDIMlVPWTxSYG5Um5siMv0NMhVn1lCDQ-Pdg86nYGYdBPA7w3c6-IPhp-oXFHbKFRmHy9_kO_caVv-lviXNmt3eJYBfdki4pI3tQFk_CZyp) **The bottom line:**_“Projects such as these are vital to the overall viability of our region as they provide opportunities to improve our local economy and provide well-paying jobs to local residents.” —_ Tim Fesko, Chairman of Gary/Chicago Airport Board of Directors, US News [**[READ] Indy Airport Opens First-Ever Art Gallery****
**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=4b24bc94f7c0443980478d5ea2f8f80c&_e=cxKe8FBmUOcltPlKj66pVutGzpL2rS1bOILxLN95NelT7Ie5mSUlQ2it2eWR1pPyW6n2kuB94JCmfoUvGMU4ETQ5Ntw6jzntzCIGt3P5B5ASXUuOkzASfD-pVT_p9BfqL-KUh7RjHKrjptjsFs8MPZ6YqqdCs_JU5cO9m_7hKCtb7NFYKxJUDo7NOhG-hFAAd2RUQ49p5gWX_Z4LTDqeB-Aapmr9NpHN_JgQFETCuIWBD2Jm9FavWtNldnkVt9msRAu5ldaz-JzCZHnI9auArICwfly6oGNIPvn3Hmsfws9MLLRNSnEELhtj_NvwGD8n4klk5fFoBi9xWxLT0k4VbTJmhL90YgBSUmjoOxnB-V5qJh97ZPvkmPjH4KMArlCqSx5exSCFwv-4Wmrb7crJCXYuBZX5s4HPnR7GZwhTryVJPatm_WjDJyrwXG-mT6zwXYTURzYjOAW87nGRXQi4PrkkV4S14WR_pbdwTpsdHIfLLULajLERD9UT1_WN7muo5IEKsV46Bydh35NPuvjYiQ%3D%3D)**The bottom line:** _“The airport’s new gallery and the intent behind it is a perfect partnership with the Harrison Center’s mission – which is to create forums and opportunities for public conversations between artists and the community.”_ –– Joanna Taft, Harrison Center for the Arts executive director, Indianapolis Airport Authority Friend, thank you as always for your continued support Building One Indiana for ALL. clean_body: Under Gov. Holcomb’s leadership, Indiana is taking flight... Hey friend, this is Jake. Are you planning a trip? Ready to take that one you had to postpone last year? With the world getting back to normal, it’s time to hit the friendly skies. And thanks to Governor Holcomb’s leadership, Hoosiers now have more options than ever: New non-stop routes. New airlines. Revamped airport experiences. Airport improvements. As we bounce back from the global pandemic, Indiana is reaching new heights. I’ve included a few articles below that highlight how Indiana’s airports are soaring: [[READ] Indy Airport Scores New Nonstop Service to Austin]() The bottom line:“This is a triple win for Hoosier travelers. We’re getting another new nonstop, and to the great city of Austin, Texas where food and music culture thrive...” — Mario Rodriguez, executive director of Indianapolis Airport Authority, Inside Indiana Business [[READ] Sun Country Airlines Marks Inaugural Flight out of Indy]() The bottom line:“Last year’s Routes Americas conference in Indy is already paying dividends and we’re thrilled to see this partnership between IND and Sun Country take off. In addition to getting our own residents out to Sun Country’s strong network of vacation destinations, this also provides an affordable option for visitors to experience why Indy has been named a 2021 best place to travel by both Condé Nast Traveler and Travel + Leisure.” — Leonard Hoops, President and Chief Executive Officer of Visit Indy, Building Indiana [[READ] Gary Airport Gets $3.5 Million to Finish Improvements]() The bottom line:“Projects such as these are vital to the overall viability of our region as they provide opportunities to improve our local economy and provide well-paying jobs to local residents.” — Tim Fesko, Chairman of Gary/Chicago Airport Board of Directors, US News [[READ] Indy Airport Opens First-Ever Art Gallery ]( bottom line: “The airport’s new gallery and the intent behind it is a perfect partnership with the Harrison Center’s mission – which is to create forums and opportunities for public conversations between artists and the community.” –– Joanna Taft, Harrison Center for the Arts executive director, Indianapolis Airport Authority Friend, thank you as always for your continued support Building One Indiana for ALL. Jake Oakman | | | | | ---|--- | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2021. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: re: For The People Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Today.
#
Peter, today may mark a turning point for our democracy. But not in the way I had hoped.
Later today, the Senate will vote on whether to begin debating the For The People Act, landmark and popular voting rights legislation. This is the big chance we have before the 2022 elections to combat the dangerous voter suppression bills that Republicans have been passing across the country. It’s our opportunity to protect our democracy. But with the filibuster still in place, we need 60 votes to begin debate. That means 10 of Mitch McConnell’s Republican obstructionists. Put another way: it has no chance of passing the Senate with the filibuster in place.
The GOP will block the For The People Act because of the filibuster AND because Republicans want to suppress the vote. It’s as simple as that. **So what do we do now? We END the filibuster. And Senate Democrats must do so immediately!**
[**If you agree with me that we need to END the filibuster, protect the right to vote, and preserve our democracy, please support my work today. Chip in $3 or anything at all to fuel this urgent effort to end the filibuster before it’s too late.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4054?refcode=em20210622-397&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=397%2E420207%2E78i_TC)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4054?refcode=em20210622-397&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=397%2E420207%2E78i_TC)**
If we do not end the filibuster right away, our democracy will only face greater threats. The GOP’s shameless efforts to hide what happened on January 6 led them to use the filibuster to block the creation of a commission to fully investigate the deadly attack on the Capitol.
Republicans will always prioritize voter suppression and protecting people like Donald Trump and Ted Cruz who fuel attacks on our country. And with the filibuster in place, our Democratic majority won’t be able to pass the critical reforms needed at this moment — like getting big money out of politics, LGBTQIA+ protections, gun violence prevention measures, and more. It’s clear: we must nix the filibuster and deliver for the people.
**[I won’t stop fighting for voting rights — and I won’t stop fighting for our democracy. Chip in $3 right now to help fuel my fight to end the filibuster >>](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4054?refcode=em20210622-397&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=397%2E420207%2E78i_TC)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210622-397-footer&t=22&refcode2=397_420207_78i_TC&akid=397%2E420207%2E78i_TC)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: You know me... I'm not one to mince words.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
You don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.
Hey Peter, it's Governor Ron DeSantis. You know me -- I'm not one to mince words.
**Neither is President Trump.**
That's why I proudly supported him when he just made this bold statement: _" The survival of America depends upon our ability to elect Republicans at every level."_
The Liberal Media, the Radical Socialists in Congress, and Joe Biden's cronies are plowing ahead to FUNDAMENTALLY change everything that makes America great.
[**I 'm asking for you to help Republicans right now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57784442:6ggcxKlbN:m:1:3253819041:6F1BF63B6713C63B3E95849EA2AB8BEE:r)
Our country is at a crossroad.
We either let the Democrats turn America into a Socialist country and tear President Trump's legacy apart...
**OR we come together and prove that our America first movement is worth fighting for!**
[**If every Patriot chips in a few bucks, we will have the resources to elect Republicans up and down the ballot!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57784443:6ggcxKlbN:m:1:3253819041:6F1BF63B6713C63B3E95849EA2AB8BEE:r)
_This won't be easy -- we need your help._
...And you don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.
**That 's why I'm coming directly to you, Peter. Are you in?**
For America,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57784443:6ggcxKlbN:m:1:3253819041:6F1BF63B6713C63B3E95849EA2AB8BEE:r)

name: Governor Greg Abbott
subject: I'm proud of our track record
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT
body:
As the 48th Governor of the great state of Texas, I'm proud of what we've done to deliver on our conservative agenda.

| | If you wish to unsubscribe, click here.
As the 48th Governor of the great state of Texas, I'm proud of what we've done to deliver on our conservative agenda.

I've spent decades fighting for the Rule of Law. Now I'm leading the way to back the blue and prevent liberals from defunding the police, which would do nothing but put the people of Texas and our nation in danger.

A safer America also depends on a secure border. From my many visits to our southern border, I've seen firsthand what happens when the President NEGLECTS the border crisis he created. That's why Texas is taking action in the Biden administration's absence by advancing historic funding to secure the border and finish construction of the border wall.

Additionally, I've always recognized the importance of the Second Amendment. It's appalling to see Democrats across the nation trying to take away our constitutional rights. That's why I've signed legislation that makes Texas a Second Amendment Sanctuary State. Let's be clear: _**in Texas our right to bear arms will always be protected.**_

Friend, I'm extremely proud of our track record, but that doesn't mean there isn't more that we can accomplish.

**[I'm personally asking you to become a Day 1 Donor TODAY, Friend, so that we can continue making sure Texas leads the way in implementing a conservative agenda.](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/10092304/224717773/203679/1/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=1e6a6d2b "I�m personally asking you to become a Day 1 Donor TODAY, \[=v\(@sFirstName\)=\], so that we can continue making sure Texas leads the way in implementing a conservative agenda.")**
_**[Become a Day 1 Donor before it's too late>>>](https://secure.winred.com/greg-abbott-for-tx/day-1-donor/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210622_T-rp.101499_governor-greg-abbott_t1072208-482&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=T-rp.101499&utm_content=20210622_im-proud-of-our-track-record "Become a Day 1 Donor before it�s too late>>>")**_
I can assure you, Friend: I'll NEVER stop fighting to deliver on our shared conservative values and keep Texas the greatest state in the nation.

However, this isn't a fight I can win alone. We NEED you on our team if we're going to be successful, _**[which is why I'm humbly asking you to become a Day 1 Donor HERE>>>](https://secure.winred.com/greg-abbott-for-tx/day-1-donor/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210622_T-rp.101499_governor-greg-abbott_t1072208-482&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=T-rp.101499&utm_content=20210622_im-proud-of-our-track-record "which is why I�m humbly asking you to become a Day 1 Donor HERE>>>")**_

Thank you,

Governor Greg Abbott

body:
The Biden Administration is plotting to undermine the rights of law-abiding citizens through a national gun registry. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=6a6c56f55f93401986205e6572caef5b&_e=W2162x9FUfGzoJPVleYr-8AJZ5XvL_MXp_4bIFV_8geb5wNp56sRfCrLpagUrQeiyYw1xpSlwDZZx_gUjyKn08o_hD7GIl-0iZeQZn-AZvJHVdlB4S4eq3isNxdTOO-8Hn04dWD1RSCiZEfIypLuAk4CcuQZqeVAoOAhKF5T3_5RnQx6BjIU7Ink2YkXc747Ri_p4Z2EGF7jgOUUniwmXdAr92hlvNDmjcNutk4_ERwqJf_-3BsAqqTmIzITc2QwLOFSPOFcN3w4-JQduQMDHaJW7MZVOaHYwiX9iAxXJVSv3ctrqH8Lh-GEbK3TpRzckafIpddT_BA48qpvrbuQ59a3HvgiGritwXoAEy2gYmMyF9V7HQq7w71Fh_pYT5CGDblio0E1fKIBNNR4k0MiwQ%3D%3D) | |

Peter,
We knew Joe Biden would come after the 2nd Amendment, and his administration wasted little time!

The Biden Administration is plotting to undermine the rights of law-abiding citizens through a national gun registry.

They would never admit it’s a gun registry, but their newly proposed ATF rules would require gun dealers to store the personal information of gun owners and the guns they own, **FOREVER**.

Sounds like **A GUN REGISTRY **to me!

I penned a letter to the ATF, voicing my concerns, and the concerns of millions of law-abiding gun owners.
[**FIGHT THE GUN GRAB**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=6a6c56f55f93401986205e6572caef5b&_e=W2162x9FUfGzoJPVleYr-8AJZ5XvL_MXp_4bIFV_8geb5wNp56sRfCrLpagUrQeiyYw1xpSlwDZZx_gUjyKn08o_hD7GIl-0iZeQZn-AZvJHVdlB4S4eq3isNxdTOO-8Hn04dWD1RSCiZEfIypLuAk4CcuQZqeVAoOAhKF5T3_5RnQx6BjIU7Ink2YkXc747DM7ertsGm72RJHFsU94QS1bCPIH8C-TmBRVR5Isa3STCLALIrm50ZMPxDYIBluxz_VUmt5wBVwBYM90sCrYDgh2tQpBVkc4hIVE8ivcLlylh-4wCBofZL5LDjtwWrXesFHkHZOqiAjkEtl3tHHJKXJki_1oXn6g7ZwOhz9DCEp-i2KjLhcqkic7LcZToVCVgiiBjYvFMespbtTogMaSBnw%3D%3D)
The left-wing elitists pushing this anti-2nd Amendment agenda are well funded and have friends in the media to push their message.

The left's ultimate goal is **to confiscate the guns of law-abiding citizens** , and a gun registry is the first step!

I need patriots like **YOU** to help me fight back!

**Will you donate today and help my fight to protect the rights of law-abiding gun owners?**
[**DONATE**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=6a6c56f55f93401986205e6572caef5b&_e=W2162x9FUfGzoJPVleYr-8AJZ5XvL_MXp_4bIFV_8geb5wNp56sRfCrLpagUrQeiyYw1xpSlwDZZx_gUjyKn08o_hD7GIl-0iZeQZn-AZvJHVdlB4S4eq3isNxdTOO-8Hn04dWD1RSCiZEfIypLuAk4CcuQZqeVAoOAhKF5T3_5RnQx6BjIU7Ink2YkXc747A5bQttJXDG02ejUIWZy9uDewnJ-pOd-7p5oiC2E8ku3BHiuSORMm_spAtMKgRqw5H-5tu3MbiFmVJMPJxoxOneTYYbkOH6TQuVa_EYZOiRyXJe1R3-9VB9oHiJPRZR5lTz8H8Mjr6hKnO9lml-2NDz5prjbfiQnwhPFmbT6613WasuVeVi5xI1t4g9os4uPUOzDy2ARzTI9fRxGdpc76iA%3D%3D)

Josh

Making DeSantis a one term governor is our mission. **But the stakes just got a lot higher.** If DeSantis is reelected, there's no question he will use the governor's office as the platform for his national ambitions. Florida deserves better, and so does America!

But beating him won't be easy. From QAnon conspiracy theorists, propaganda networks like _El American,_ and special interest industries like oil and gas, **DeSantis has a steady flow of cash** propping up his campaign war chest.

Our campaign couldn't be more different. Charlie is counting on grassroots supporters _like you_ to make our Florida For All campaign a success. **They may have the money, but we have _the masses_.** And the more folks we have on our side, the better positioned we'll be to defeat Ron DeSantis.

That's why **we 've set a goal of earning 500 grassroots donations by midnight tonight** \-- and I'm reaching out because I was hoping you could be one of them!

**If you 're able, please make a donation to Charlie's campaign now to help us reach our goal. Your support will make all the difference in what will be a very tight race with national implications!**

name: Wendy Rogers
subject: Important Arizona Audit Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE
body:
Important information |
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57786021:6yUKeKl7N:m:1:3253819041:17C69344EB7D69C160808A4F716CF8D5:r)
---
| Hi Peter,

I walked the floor for three hours at the Arizona Audit, and I have some things to say.

First, let me say that the media wouldn't know the truth if they were hit over the head with it. The scope of their misreporting has been borderline legally actionable.

Second, Katie Hobbs is an inveterate liar whose incompetence and fraud are being revealed through this audit.

Third, anyone who still trusts the Dominion voting machines at this point, either wants fraud or is too lazy to hand count the ballots.

I am Senator Wendy Rogers, the Arizona State Senator who was a pivotal vote for the audit. I have been to the audit and I wanted to share the REAL scoop with you. **[Can you help me get the truth out so people understand what's REALLY happening at the audit?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57786021:6yUKeKl7N:m:1:3253819041:17C69344EB7D69C160808A4F716CF8D5:r)**
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57786021:6yUKeKl7N:m:1:3253819041:17C69344EB7D69C160808A4F716CF8D5:r)
---
| _**Here are some of my takeaways from the tour of the audit yesterday:**_

There has been an increase in capacity now:

From 17 to 32 paper inspection tables using microscopic cameras;
From 20 to 44 counting tables (yellow, green, blue);
From 4 to 12 aggregation tables.

The pace is picking up daily, with more audit forensics done each day. This process will be done soon!

Theoretically, mail-in ballots should all be of the same type, composition, and fiber with little to no variance. So if variances ARE seen, there should be an explanation; if there is no explanation, then that is a gap.

_These are issues we can address with additional future legislation._

703 precincts were condensed down to 175 precincts. Every precinct has different ballots. Thus, if your ballot was "printed on demand", then the paper in those situations could legitimately vary... but the paper should not vary for mail-in ballots.

We now DO finally have the deleted databases folder that was missing for some time.

1\. Despite news accounts, it really WAS deleted. The media got this wrong, shockingly.
2\. It was CyFIR who discovered this, and they are none other than the firm who discovered the June 2015 U.S. Government Office of Personnel Management (OPM) breach, where SF86 forms used for Top Secret security clearances were compromised. The bad guys had been infiltrated into OPM for three years.
3\. Here is the reason that the databases are important:

Let's say a ballot box's pink slip says there are 200 ballots contained in the box. Really, only 99 physical ballots are actually IN the box (yes this is happening a LOT).

There should be TWO cross-references to verify this. The Dominion machine would have a batch number corresponding to that grouping of ballots AND Dominion should have the scanned imagery to similarly correlate to those ballots. Where are the remaining 101 ballots? Are they imaged in Dominion? Is their batch number tallied in Dominion? That's why we need the databases.

Noteworthy that both Dominion and Secretary Hobbs have declined the invitation to observe the audit, however everything is still being video recorded.

_Now, will the AZ Audit be enough?_

Yes, because it will inform legislation necessary to plug the gaps to restore the public's confidence. That is the reason the Arizona Senate is doing this, so we know the loopholes and can close them.

There was a helpful debrief from the Cyber Ninjas CEO. Here are the highlights:

1\. This has never been done before.
2\. It's really important for our democracy to be transparent.
3\. Unfortunately, technology has gotten in the way rather than helping.
4\. Where will we be if voters think their votes don't matter anymore?
5\. We have a solid AZ Audit team that is ready and capable to get it done.
6\. This is a calling. We will overcome any and every obstacle.
7\. He can't wait till it's over so that the participants can talk all they want about what they've seen!
8\. Physical data collection will be completed by the end of June. The report will follow sometime later.

I was also able to speak with a floor volunteer who is a retired USAF pilot. Here's what he had to say:

1\. Chain of custody procedures are as precise and flawless as Strategic Air Command's. Signing off of authenticators' "secrets" was not as stringent as the AZ Audit! Going to the bathroom for 10 minutes requires a sign-off.
2\. Laughable that the AZ Secretary of State said her machines were compromised when she initially said they were unhackable.

Here are the procedures on the floor:
1\. All volunteer counters must be from Maricopa county and have voted in the November 2020 election (they must have skin in the game).
2\. Tally sheets and ballots can physically move only if 3 things are present:
People
Paper
Camera
3\. Three components to the AZ Audit layout: Counting - Aggregation - Forensics.
4\. Every worker treats the process on the floor as if he were in a court of law.

As you can see, and I could verify with my own two eyes, this audit is being carried out with the greatest of care and by true professionals who know what they are doing and care about our democratic processes.

The transparency here has been remarkable. Every citizen can visit the video feed and witness what's going on.

_**The best practices being developed here can be used for future audits, such as those being considered in Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, Georgia, and other states. **_
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57786021:6yUKeKl7N:m:1:3253819041:17C69344EB7D69C160808A4F716CF8D5:r)
---
| We knew there was something wrong with the 2020 election at the beginning of this process. Already we are troubled by several issues and discrepancies that need to be sorted out.

I'm so glad we did this audit! But it only happened because I won my seat in a swing district!

**I'm thrilled to see movements for audits in Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, Georgia, and other places. They can use the procedures we developed for the Arizona audit!**

_The machines are a problem. The procedures were faulty. We clearly have work ahead of us to guarantee election integrity in Arizona._

[Stand with me so we can finish the job!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57786021:6yUKeKl7N:m:1:3253819041:17C69344EB7D69C160808A4F716CF8D5:r)

_I am bringing you updates because we know the worthless media will not. I want you to know the truth- the media only wants to shill for the leftist Democrats._

[Help me fight!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57786021:6yUKeKl7N:m:1:3253819041:17C69344EB7D69C160808A4F716CF8D5:r) \- Help me keep my seat so we can see this process through, together!

Thank you and God bless you.
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57786021:6yUKeKl7N:m:1:3253819041:17C69344EB7D69C160808A4F716CF8D5:r)
---
| Wendy Rogers, Lt Col USAF (ret)
Arizona State Senator
Arizona's 6th Legislative District
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57786021:6yUKeKl7N:m:1:3253819041:17C69344EB7D69C160808A4F716CF8D5:r)
---
| P.S. I am fighting hard to fulfill my campaign promises. I am taking a lot of heat but I don't care. [Please support me by helping me raise my goal by the end of this month.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57786021:6yUKeKl7N:m:1:3253819041:17C69344EB7D69C160808A4F716CF8D5:r) Thank you.

body:
I need you to read this now, before today's vote.

I wanted to make sure you saw my email from yesterday. The vote on H.R. 1 / S. 1 is just a few hours away — and we MUST stop it in its tracks.

Nothing about this bill is “For the People.” It’s a Pelosi Power Grab that would put Swamp Democrats in charge of our elections and give the Left permanent power.

Will you help me stop it? Donate here. (https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/stop-hr-1-email-fundraising?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021june22hf)

H.R. 1 / S. 1 makes a joke out of election security. It outlaws voter ID, mandates ballot harvesting, and even opens the door for illegal immigrants to vote in our elections.

Help me stop this liberal power grab. Donate here. (https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/stop-hr-1-email-fundraising?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021june22hf)

The contrast couldn’t be clearer on this issue. Republicans want to make it easier to vote and harder to cheat. Democrats want to change the rules so they never lose power.

We only have a few hours left to stop this insanity, and I’m asking you to stand with me. Please, donate whatever you can here. (https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/stop-hr-1-email-fundraising?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021june22hf)

To: All Supporters
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/stop-hr-1-email-fundraising?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021june22hf
Tomorrow, Democrats are forcing a vote on H.R. 1 / S. 1 in the U.S. Senate. They’re OBSESSED with passing this bill because it does the following:
* OUTLAWS voter ID.
* MANDATES ballot harvesting.
* Uses your tax dollars to fund their campaigns.
* Lets illegal immigrants vote in our elections.

H.R. 1 / S. 1 is nothing but a Nancy Pelosi Power Grab that would give Democrats TOTAL power of our elections.

Before the vote, I want to send a loud and clear message to Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, Joe Biden, and Kamala Harris that Kansans and Americans are united against this unprecedented power grab.

Will you rush a donation of $100, $50, or even just $15 right now? (https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/stop-hr-1-email-fundraising?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021june22hf)

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Tracing Adam Schiff’s Subpoena Hypocrisy
body:
Just a few years ago, Rep. Adam Schiff had no qualms using secret subpoenas to obtain the phone records of American citizens without their consent.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jun 21, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55999&L=25178&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZml0dG9uLXNjaGlmZi1oeXBvY3Jpc3kvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYyMjE4NTEwMg==) | **[Tracing Adam Schiff’s Subpoena Hypocrisy](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55999&L=25178&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZml0dG9uLXNjaGlmZi1oeXBvY3Jpc3kvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYyMjE4NTEwMg==)** During the 2019 Impeachment investigation of President Donald Trump, Mr. Schiff, as chairman of the House Intelligence Committee, obtained the phone records of many prominent figures in the Trump orbit, including Rudy Giuliani, Rep. Devin Nunes, California Republican, Jay Sekulow and others using secret subpoenas. Mr. Schiff then compounded his constitutional abuse by actually publishing these private phone records. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55999&L=25178&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZml0dG9uLXNjaGlmZi1oeXBvY3Jpc3kvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYyMjE4NTEwMg==)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55999&L=25145&F=H&) | **[Federal Prison Inmates Escape Undetected, Deceive Guards with Dummies in Bed](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55999&L=25145&F=H&)** The nation’s federal prison system is in hot water again, this time for security failures that allow inmates to escape undetected. In some cases, the prisoners who slip away place dummies in their bed to deceive correctional officers and in other instances they simply have other inmates pose as them during counts. Details of the breaches are offered in a Management Advisory Memorandum issued this month by the Department of Justice (DOJ) Inspector General (IG). The document focuses on the Federal Bureau of Prisons (FOB) minimum security facilities, known as Federal Prison Camp (FPC) and Satellite Prison Camp (SPC) locations. The watchdog’s findings should embarrass FOB officials at every level. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55999&L=25145&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55999&L=25158&F=H&) | **[U.S. Lets Leftist Groups Pick Illegal Alien Asylees, Expands Central American Youth Entry](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55999&L=25158&F=H&)** The Biden administration has confirmed leftist groups are picking hundreds of illegal immigrants daily to enter the U.S. to request asylum and the comeback of an Obama-era program to woo more Central American minors though there are already tens of thousands in government shelters nationwide. The double whammy was delivered just weeks apart as the migrant crisis reaches a boiling point and the nation sees record high illegal immigration along the nearly 2,000-mile Mexican border. High-ranking administration officials call it a “legal alternative to irregular migration.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55999&L=25158&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55999&L=25135&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctZm9pYS1jb3ZpZC13dWhhbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjIyMTg1MTAy) | **[Judicial Watch Files Two New Federal FOIA Lawsuits for Information on COVID and Wuhan Institute of Virology](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55999&L=25135&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctZm9pYS1jb3ZpZC13dWhhbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjIyMTg1MTAy)** “We don’t trust either the Biden administration or the Deep State to voluntarily come clean on COVID and its possible connections to the Wuhan Institute,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Judicial Watch’s FOIA lawsuits could be the key to unraveling the truth about COVID and the Wuhan Institute.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55999&L=25135&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctZm9pYS1jb3ZpZC13dWhhbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjIyMTg1MTAy)
---|---
|
---
| |
---
### [US Gave More Money to Chinese Lab for Bat Research Than Fauci Claimed: Documents ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55999&L=25179&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZmF1Y2ktd3VoYW4tYmF0cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjIyMTg1MTAy) The Epoch Times Internal emails from officials with the National Institutes of Health and an office inside the agency, the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID), show they discussed a question posed by Republican members of Congress in 2020 regarding how much the agencies sent to the Wuhan Institute of Virology. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55999&L=25179&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZmF1Y2ktd3VoYW4tYmF0cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjIyMTg1MTAy)
---
### [Gregg Jarrett: Rep. Adam Schiff’s fury and outrage over seized phone records is a perverse irony ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55999&L=25146&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3Mvc2NoaWZmLXBob25lLXJlY29yZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYyMjE4NTEwMg==) Fox News Schiff’s tantrum was triggered by the recent disclosure that the Trump Department of Justice obtained his phone records, along with another California Democrat, Eric Swalwell and several journalists. Their data was seized pursuant to grand jury subpoenas served on Apple in 2017 and 2018 when Schiff was the ranking Democrat on the House Intelligence Committee and Swalwell was his lackey-in-chief. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55999&L=25146&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3Mvc2NoaWZmLXBob25lLXJlY29yZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYyMjE4NTEwMg==)
---
### [‘No One Comes Through the Border Illegally Without the Cartels’ Authorization’: How Biden’s Policies Feed a Criminal Monopoly ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55999&L=25180&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZmFycmVsbC1kYWlseS1zaWduYWwtY2FydGVscy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjIyMTg1MTAy) The Daily Signal Chris Farrell, director of investigations and research at Judicial Watch, explained to me in an interview how the cartels’ control of the Mexican border is driven by profit and dehumanizes the people they traffic. Farrell, a former Army counterintelligence officer, has over 18 years of experience investigating the U.S.-Mexican border, including a narco terror plot against Chicago launched from Juarez, Mexico. clean_body: Just a few years ago, Rep. Adam Schiff had no qualms using secret subpoenas to obtain the phone records of American citizens without their consent. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jun 21, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == During the 2019 Impeachment investigation of President Donald Trump, Mr. Schiff, as chairman of the House Intelligence Committee, obtained the phone records of many prominent figures in the Trump orbit, including Rudy Giuliani, Rep. Devin Nunes, California Republican, Jay Sekulow and others using secret subpoenas. Mr. Schiff then compounded his constitutional abuse by actually publishing these private phone records. == ---|--- | | | | | The nation’s federal prison system is in hot water again, this time for security failures that allow inmates to escape undetected. In some cases, the prisoners who slip away place dummies in their bed to deceive correctional officers and in other instances they simply have other inmates pose as them during counts. Details of the breaches are offered in a Management Advisory Memorandum issued this month by the Department of Justice (DOJ) Inspector General (IG). The document focuses on the Federal Bureau of Prisons (FOB) minimum security facilities, known as Federal Prison Camp (FPC) and Satellite Prison Camp (SPC) locations. The watchdog’s findings should embarrass FOB officials at every level. ---|--- | | | | | The Biden administration has confirmed leftist groups are picking hundreds of illegal immigrants daily to enter the U.S. to request asylum and the comeback of an Obama-era program to woo more Central American minors though there are already tens of thousands in government shelters nationwide. The double whammy was delivered just weeks apart as the migrant crisis reaches a boiling point and the nation sees record high illegal immigration along the nearly 2,000-mile Mexican border. High-ranking administration officials call it a “legal alternative to irregular migration.” ---|--- | | | | | “We don’t trust either the Biden administration or the Deep State to voluntarily come clean on COVID and its possible connections to the Wuhan Institute,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Judicial Watch’s FOIA lawsuits could be the key to unraveling the truth about COVID and the Wuhan Institute.” ---|--- | | | The Epoch Times Internal emails from officials with the National Institutes of Health and an office inside the agency, the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID), show they discussed a question posed by Republican members of Congress in 2020 regarding how much the agencies sent to the Wuhan Institute of Virology. == Fox News Schiff’s tantrum was triggered by the recent disclosure that the Trump Department of Justice obtained his phone records, along with another California Democrat, Eric Swalwell and several journalists. Their data was seized pursuant to grand jury subpoenas served on Apple in 2017 and 2018 when Schiff was the ranking Democrat on the House Intelligence Committee and Swalwell was his lackey-in-chief. == The Daily Signal Chris Farrell, director of investigations and research at Judicial Watch, explained to me in an interview how the cartels’ control of the Mexican border is driven by profit and dehumanizes the people they traffic. Farrell, a former Army counterintelligence officer, has over 18 years of experience investigating the U.S.-Mexican border, including a narco terror plot against Chicago launched from Juarez, Mexico. = = = = = = | CLIPS = == | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

body:
Cassidy HAS to go |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=d0416a6d27&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots delivering accountability to Congress, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=e54a58d4e0&e=ba6e67b849)!

**Any Republican connected with attacking President Trump, and the America First movement, MUST be held accountable. That goes double in the Senate, the last bulwark against the Dems' Communism.**

Sen. Bill Cassidy (RINO-LA) is one of these worthless Leftist Republicans we must get rid of.

He made news for defending and supporting Trump-hating Liz Cheney, LAST MONTH:

_Cassidy’s declaration follows the Louisiana Republican arguing in a Sunday interview with NBC’s Meet the Press that if the GOP wants to win in 2022 and 2024, the party must agree with Cheney’s view that former President Donald Trump lost the 2020 presidential election to President Joe Biden.

“If you look at polls, there’s a whole group of folks that agree with Liz Cheney. And so, for us to win in 2022 and 2024, we need everybody. We need those who feel as Liz, those who feel as Lindsey. Ultimately it’s about the policies. You see that Cheney, Cassidy, support those policies. Those policies are a ticket to victory. Those policies bring us back in 2022,” Cassidy told host Chuck Todd._

This guy is totally clueless. He's one of the "7 Romneys" who voted to convict President Trump in the U.S. Senate. Then he goes on far-Left extremist MSNBC to bash Republicans and attack Trump- and to support Trump-hating Liz Cheney.

Seriously, this guy is a DEMOCRAT in disguise. He acts like the "LA" that comes after his name stands for Los Angeles, not Louisiana!
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=c0ab566792&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **This isn't the first offense for RINO Cassidy. He's always fighting for Dems:**

_Cassidy supported the appointment of people like Miguel Cardenas as Education Secretary, Linda Thomas-Greenfield as UN ambassador and Merrick Garland as Attorney General. What policies is Bill Cassidy talking about? Does he not realize personnel is policy? And should Republican voters be good with a Merrick Garland who sends the FBI to raid Rudy Giuliani’s house while refusing to accept a copy of Hunter Biden’s hard drive when Giuliani repeatedly attempts to give it to them?_

_Those policies, Bill?

Playing pet Republican to the mainstream media, which requires repeated bashings of fellow Republicans for the pleasure of the woke leftist corporate suits who run those networks, is a decent way to catch a big check at the first of the month, at least until the cable news networks and NBC Newses of the world run off so much of their audience that the cash dries up. It’s a pretty good bet that’s exactly what Liz Cheney is going to do after she gets tossed out of Congress by the voters in Wyoming in next year’s GOP primary.

But it’s an especially lousy way to win elections._

_Cassidy is no better than Romney, Cheney, Murkowski, Collins and the like. We need to start NOW to unseat these faithless RINOs. If we take a couple of scalps among them, it will scare the NEXT "Romney" back into line!_

[We need to make them respect the voters who put them there!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=eaf2c21c2c&e=ba6e67b849)
---

---
| **Biden is senile and the people controlling him are Marxists! NOW is the time to fight them before they destroy the country. [Help us show them how to fight- or show them the door!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=94dfd677ad&e=ba6e67b849)**

The RINOs love to tell us what we want to hear at Election time- only to break our hearts the next year. Cassidy is one of these. We won't let them get away with this! [Your $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or $1,000 donation is c](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=87ef6fdb8b&e=ba6e67b849)[rucial to holding the Senate accountable!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=48998c7d01&e=ba6e67b849)

The Swamp hates conservatives. They like their closed door, elite mentality. Help me bust this cartel up!

[Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=ca306e6b75&e=ba6e67b849)

Hey it’s Deandrea, Erica’s campaign chair!
Just wanted to make sure you saw Erica’s photos from last weekend (see forwarded email below).
Each and every community we meet on our 100 Counties 100 Days Tour gives me LIFFEEE!!! **Our campaign is going everywhere, criss-crossing North Carolina to visit places that most Senate candidates have never campaigned in before.** No county forgotten, and nobody overlooked — that’s how Erica Smith rolls.
But y'all, in order to visit the remaining 90-odd counties on our ambitious, history-making tour, we need to raise a lot more money online from emails like this one. Especially with our gigantic FEC fundraising deadline in just eight days...
[**_If you’re in a place to do so, can you please chip in $5 or more to help fund the rest of our 100 Counties 100 Days Tour? I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t so important!_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2895?refcode=em20210622-199&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=199%2E3698%2EnKWcc_)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2895?refcode=em20210622-199&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=199%2E3698%2EnKWcc_)**
Thanks so much for your support,
Deandrea
\----------Forwarded message---------
From: Erica Smith <info@ericaforus.com>
Date: Tuesday, Jun 15, 2021
Subject: It felt like visiting a plantation
Hi again, it’s Erica!
It was another busy weekend on the road. We visited Martin County, Gates County, and Hertford County (and also went back to Elizabeth City).
I have some powerful photos to show you...
But first, I have to respectfully ask: [**_Is there any way you could please make another donation of $5 or more to help fund our 100 Counties 100 Days Tour? We won’t have enough funding to pull off the rest of this ambitious tour without raising a lot of money through emails like this one._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2895?refcode=em20210622-199&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=199%2E3698%2EnKWcc_)
**[Donate »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2895?refcode=em20210622-199&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=199%2E3698%2EnKWcc_)**
Alright, now here’s my update from the road:
While in Hertford County, we stopped by the Rivers Correctional Facility, a recently closed private prison. **It felt like visiting a plantation.** Private prisons are utterly and entirely immoral, and they should be abolished immediately.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2895?refcode=em20210622-199&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=199%2E3698%2EnKWcc_)
We traveled across Gates County, **meeting folks where they are and making sure everyone is registered to vote.** We even made sure that local restaurants had registration papers on hand and set up.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2895?refcode=em20210622-199&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=199%2E3698%2EnKWcc_)
Finally, at our meet-and-greet at Porky’s Backyard BBQ in Martin County, we had an awesome conversation with Mayor Brown and North Carolina voters. Not to mention, some delicious BBQ.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2895?refcode=em20210622-199&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=199%2E3698%2EnKWcc_)
**We are going everywhere, meeting voters where they are, and leaving no one behind!!!** Together, we can transform our politics and make this state work for all of us.
[**_But I simply can’t do it without grassroots online support. Can you please make another donation of $5 or more to help fund the rest of our 100 Counties 100 Days Tour?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2895?refcode=em20210622-199&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=26&akid=199%2E3698%2EnKWcc_)
**[Donate »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2895?refcode=em20210622-199&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=27&akid=199%2E3698%2EnKWcc_)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210622-199-footer&t=28&refcode2=199_3698_nKWcc_&akid=199%2E3698%2EnKWcc_)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matt=2C=20VA=20Justice=20Dems?=
subject: Time to push the "American Jobs Plan"
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Virginia Justice Democrats
body:
| | | | [ ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=2bfa0c1b6b&e=76fc145c69)
---
| | | Derek- With Biden in the White House and Democratic Majority in Congress, we need to make sure we are still pushing for the big economic changes we need to protect our workers and Virginia families, even on the Federal Level. We can't afford to sit back just because we have a Democrat in the White House. Now's the time to deliver! President Biden’s $2.3 trillion Plan would dramatically expand union households while rebuilding our economy and fighting climate change. But some in Congress are dragging their feet while calling for massive cuts to the President’s plan. **[On June 29th at noon: Join the solidarity rally for union workers, climate action, and the “American Jobs Plan” on the National Mall. Hear music from the DC Labor Chorus and inspiring speakers from the AFL-CIO, the Labor Network for Sustainability, CCAN Action Fund, and more.](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=a8005ac810&e=76fc145c69) **
---
| [ ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=7ce863c1d8&e=76fc145c69)
---
|
---
| With Covid restrictions ebbing – but climate impacts skyrocketing – it’s time to gather in person to tell Congress to pass the American Jobs Plan without delay. The $2.3 trillion Biden plan will rebuild our economy with equity, expand union households, and fight climate change with massive investments in wind turbines, solar energy, and 500,000 new charging stations for electric vehicles. Meanwhile, unions built the middle class in America and now they deserve our support. If we want to solve the chronic problems of wealth inequality and economic insecurity in this country, we need to restore the power and breadth of our unions everywhere, including in the emerging green energy economy. The American Jobs Plan calls for repairing our ailing roads and bridges and other infrastructure with union labor – creating millions of new, family-sustaining jobs. The plan explicitly calls for passage of the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act – a bill prized by organized labor for decades. It calls for prevailing wages and worker protections in the emerging wind and solar industry. [Join the Rally on June 29th at Noon on the Mall! ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=3a8a40a35e&e=76fc145c69) The Biden plan would also invest $400 billion in health care for the elderly and disabled while replacing lead pipes nationwide. The “American Jobs Plan” will clean our air and water while putting more people to work – with the ability to collectively bargain.

In Solidarity,
Matt Royer
VA Justice Dems Co-Chair
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=715a04a14a&e=76fc145c69 "DONATE NOW")
---
| _Virginia Justice Democrats is independent from the national Justice Democrats. Our focus is on Virginia issues. Although we are in communication we do not take directions or instructions from the national organization. VAJD sets our own state-specific platforms, organizational structure, mission, and candidate vetting process. And with control of the House on the line, we can’t afford to risk losing a single seat. Trust me, Peter, I wish I didn’t have to send you these emails so far ahead of Election Day. But Republicans have already started targeting me because they think this is a winnable seat. Last quarter, my Republican opponent outraised me (and contributed $500,000 of her own money!) and now the GOP regards me as vulnerable, which green lights their spending on this race. That’s why GOP super PACs have already begun running attack ads in my district = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for being in this fight with me, Susan Wild | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. She believes we can grow overall economic prosperity while still caring for the vulnerable members of our community. And she knows, now more than ever, it's working-class families that deserve a break in this economy — not big city billionaires and wealthy corporations. But she needs your support today -- her campaign runs on grassroots donations since she's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. = | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, **. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

| Friends, Randy Feenstra has been a thorn in Nancy Pelosi’s side this Congress. Why? **_Because he won’t go along with her radical, socialist agenda._** **__** Randy brings a lot of Iowa commonsense to Congress. During his first few months in Congress, Randy has been a leader on the issues that matter the most – protecting life, defending Iowa farmers, stopping Biden’s wasteful spending and securing our border. Not only has Randy traveled to each of the 39 counties in Iowa’s 4th Congressional District – he’s also traveled to the border to see the Biden Border Crisis firsthand - **something Kamala Harris _refuses_ to do.** It’s easy to see that Randy delivers for his constituents, and he’s part of a strong team working to fire Nancy Pelosi and win back the house majority. But, we need your help. Randy has my full support, and he needs yours too. Can I count on you to stand with Randy today and help us win back the majority in ’22?

name: Patty Murray
subject: important news on voting rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
The Senate just voted on the For the People Act, which would protect voting rights. Unfortunately, Senate Republicans blocked the bill from moving forward.
#
Peter,
The Senate just voted on the For the People Act, which would protect voting rights. Unfortunately, Senate Republicans blocked the bill from moving forward.
I’m not giving up on passing legislation that protects every American’s access to the polls. But I also know that we face an uphill battle to overcome the GOP’s obstruction, and that if we’re not prepared, the Republicans’ ongoing campaign to restrict voting rights could have a big impact on the midterm elections.
That’s especially true in Georgia. After losing both Senate seats in January, Republicans in the Georgia legislature passed an outrageous voter suppression law designed to keep voters away so that Republicans can defeat new Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock next November.
**[I’m angry about today’s vote and I’m sure you are too. So here’s what we can do right now: chip in $1 or any amount today to split a contribution to Senator Warnock’s campaign so that we can overcome the GOP’s voter suppression efforts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31236012/292030285/-266560348?refcode=pm_em_210622_2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDliMGU2My1iNmQzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-e-N0Fqfo0NhEXot4NVXIFNmXbMUL88LTorCRtsKU4k=)**
The right to vote is fundamental to our democracy. But Republicans know that when everyone has the opportunity to vote, they lose ground.
We have to keep fighting their attacks on voting rights with everything we’ve got -- and that includes throwing as much support as we can behind Democratic candidates in states where voting rights are under attack.
**[Please split a $1 contribution to Senator Warnock and I right now to fight back against voter suppression.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31236013/292030287/-266560348?refcode=pm_em_210622_2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDliMGU2My1iNmQzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-e-N0Fqfo0NhEXot4NVXIFNmXbMUL88LTorCRtsKU4k=)**

Patty
