clean_body: The Senate just voted on the For the People Act, which would protect voting rights. Unfortunately, Senate Republicans blocked the bill from moving forward. Peter, The Senate just voted on the For the People Act, which would protect voting rights. Unfortunately, Senate Republicans blocked the bill from moving forward. I’m not giving up on passing legislation that protects every American’s access to the polls. But I also know that we face an uphill battle to overcome the GOP’s obstruction, and that if we’re not prepared, the Republicans’ ongoing campaign to restrict voting rights could have a big impact on the midterm elections. That’s especially true in Georgia. After losing both Senate seats in January, Republicans in the Georgia legislature passed an outrageous voter suppression law designed to keep voters away so that Republicans can defeat new Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock next November. = The right to vote is fundamental to our democracy. But Republicans know that when everyone has the opportunity to vote, they lose ground. We have to keep fighting their attacks on voting rights with everything we’ve got -- and that includes throwing as much support as we can behind Democratic candidates in states where voting rights are under attack. = Thank you, Patty = As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._ * PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

Radical Representative Chris Pappas has voted for a per-mile user fee for drivers, proving once again that he will put DC schemes before the people of New Hampshire.

With gas prices already out of control, _Pappas thinks now is the time charge Granite Staters just to get to work_.

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Write it down, take it home to momma!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
Please Open

| [](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/10095388/224717773/203698/1/)
---

Folks,

**I wanted to touch base with my top supporters and let them know that I will be seeking re-election for the U.S. Senate in 2022.**
**_Watch Announcement Video Below_** [](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/10095388/224717773/203698/2/)
Representing the people of Louisiana and the United States has been such an amazing privilege and one of the most important things I've done in my life, just below being a father and a husband to my wife and son.

**_[I'm asking for your support to keep the radical left out of your pockets and as far away from your jobs as possible.](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/10095388/224717773/203698/3/)_**
| [ENDORSE ME HERE](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/10095388/224717773/203698/4/)
---

I'm looking forward to getting back on the campaign trail and meeting with my constituents about the issues that matter most.**What you hear in town isn't what you see or hear up in Washington D.C., that's for certain!**

I'm trying to bring common sense and idiot control to the U.S. Senate, but Chuck Schumer isn't making that job easy. **But with your help, we might be able to get through to a few of these Democrats.**

**Chip in whatever you can. I can promise you it'll go towards helping me Take Back the Senate and defend conservatives across the country.**

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: What we do now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It happened.
#
Peter, Republicans just used the filibuster to BLOCK historic voting rights legislation. It couldn’t be more clear: it’s the filibuster OR our democracy. We must respond by getting rid of the filibuster to protect voting rights, preserve our democracy, and take power away from Mitch McConnell in the Senate!
**[If you agree, join us in this fight with an urgent donation of $3 or more right now. We included Pramila’s email from earlier to make sure you know just how important this fight is.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4057?refcode=em20210622-398&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=398%2E420207%2E6udkef)**
\- Team Jayapal

\----Forwarded Message----
From: Pramila Jayapal
Date: 6/22/21
Subject: Nix it
Peter, today may mark a turning point for our democracy. But not in the way I had hoped.
Later today, the Senate will vote on whether to begin debating the For The People Act, landmark and popular voting rights legislation. This is the big chance we have before the 2022 elections to combat the dangerous voter suppression bills that Republicans have been passing across the country. It’s our opportunity to protect our democracy. But with the filibuster still in place, we need 60 votes to begin debate. That means 10 of Mitch McConnell’s Republican obstructionists. Put another way: it has no chance of passing the Senate with the filibuster in place.
The GOP will block the For The People Act because of the filibuster AND because Republicans want to suppress the vote. It’s as simple as that. **So what do we do now? We END the filibuster. And Senate Democrats must do so immediately!**
[**If you agree with me that we need to END the filibuster, protect the right to vote, and preserve our democracy, please support my work today. Chip in $3 or anything at all to fuel this urgent effort to end the filibuster before it’s too late.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4057?refcode=em20210622-398&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=398%2E420207%2E6udkef)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4057?refcode=em20210622-398&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=398%2E420207%2E6udkef)**
If we do not end the filibuster right away, our democracy will only face greater threats. The GOP’s shameless efforts to hide what happened on January 6 led them to use the filibuster to block the creation of a commission to fully investigate the deadly attack on the Capitol.
Republicans will always prioritize voter suppression and protecting people like Donald Trump and Ted Cruz who fuel attacks on our country. And with the filibuster in place, our Democratic majority won’t be able to pass the critical reforms needed at this moment — like getting big money out of politics, LGBTQIA+ protections, gun violence prevention measures, and more. It’s clear: we must nix the filibuster and deliver for the people.
**[I won’t stop fighting for voting rights — and I won’t stop fighting for our democracy. Chip in $3 right now to help fuel my fight to end the filibuster >>](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4057?refcode=em20210622-398&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=398%2E420207%2E6udkef)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210622-398-footer&t=23&refcode2=398_420207_6udkef&akid=398%2E420207%2E6udkef)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=398%2E420207%2E6udkef)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: Help Stop the Liberal Agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
The Democrats are mortgaging the future of our great nation for generations to come... | | |
---
| |
---
| Friends,

Democrats are doing everything they can to pass as much radical legislation as possible before the next election. They know their days in power are likely numbered and that most Americans reject their liberal agenda.

Biden’s Executive Orders, Pelosi’s 1.9 trillion-dollar liberal payoff, and now, an infrastructure package that advances Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s Green New Deal are proof that Washington is further off track than ever before. _The Democrats are mortgaging the future of our great nation for generations to come._

I did not run for office so I could be the caretaker in the slow demise of our great nation. I ran so I could work every day to make it better. I have four kids and I want them to have the same opportunities I had, and my parents before me had. That is why I have worked hard every day that I have been in office to stop this madness.

_Since I was sworn in I have introduced 12 different bills that would help agriculture, strengthen private property rights, limit the President’s ability to issue executive orders, stop attacks on the 2 nd Amendment, help our veterans, and end abortion. I have also cosponsored over 110 other pieces of legislation that would help our nation get back on track. But in order for these bills to help our country we must elect a Republican majority to the U.S. House. _

Please help me fight by supporting my political efforts. I am doing everything I can in Congress to stop the liberal agenda. Your donation today will provide the fuel I need to keep fighting for a better tomorrow.

**Your contribution _before the end of the month_ is very much appreciated.** Whether $11,600 (the maximum for a married couple) or $25, please know that your contribution will be greatly appreciated and wisely used. Please [(click here)](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=83969f9a40&e=a9d1410029) to donate.

The challenges facing our nation are great. But our opportunities and potential are even greater – with hard work, our brightest days are yet to come.

Yours in the fight,
Tracey Mann

P.S. I will continue to stand for Kansas as we move forward and do everything in my power to ensure our kids have a bright future. _Please[(click here)](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=d4f521618b&e=a9d1410029) to donate today and help take our country back. _

Federal multi-candidate PACs may contribute $5,000 per election. Contributions are not deductible for income tax purposes. Federal law prohibits corporate and foreign national contributions. Contributions from labor unions, federal-government contractors, national banks, and foreign nationals without permanent residency status are prohibited.
